highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Poona College of Pharmacy ranks #35 under the category 'Pharmacy'.

The GPAT 2026 application form for admission to the MPharma course is expected to be released during the first week of April 2026.

A few more updates are as follows:

faqs.question: How are the placements at Poona College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer:
The official placement statistics have not been released yet. However, the college has released the NIRF report 2024, which incorporates the 2023 placement data. As per the report, 72 BPharma and 86 MPharma students were placed during 2023 placements. The median package for BPharma courses stood at INR 3.60 LPA and for MPharma courses, the median package recorded was INR 4.10 LPA. Check the complete insights of Poona College of Pharmacy placements 2023 from the table below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to BPharm course at Poona College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer:
The minimum eligibility requirement to get admission into the BPharm course at Poona College of Pharmacy is that candidates must complete their Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects, and Mathematics/ Biology as one of the subjects, with an aggregate of 45% (40% for the SC/ST category). Moreover, candidates who have completed a DPharm course or any education approved by the Pharmacy Council of India can apply for a BPharm course.
Further, candidates are required to appear in BV-PHARMUG (conducted by the affiliating university). Candidates who get shortlisted in the entrance exam will go through a counselling process of spot admission held by the college.

faqs.answer: The names of the recent recruiters for the BPharm course at Poona College of Pharmacy have not been announced. However, as per the previous placements statistics of the BPharm course, there are several recruiters who recruit BPharm students on decent placement packages. The names of some of the placement companies are Biocon, Biologics, Cognizant, Healthosphere, TCS, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and all facilities.

review_content.Placements: Some students are placed 64% based on their CGPA or SGPA. The highest package offered is 7LPA. The lowest package is 3LPA. Sun Pharma is the top recruiting company in our college. Many of the students got selected by that company from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, like it is well disciplined and well maintained. Classroom labs are well cleaned, well sanitized, and also very clean. Mess is also okay. Sometimes they give good food like good bhajis and all. Sometimes the quality is not good from our mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Pharm D with the best college.

review_content.Placements: Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) is a 6-year postgraduate course which helps us understand the clinical aspects as a pharmacist as well as hospital interaction. Poona College of Pharmacy provides the best placements with top-notch companies like Cipla, Mankind, Tata Hospital, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college, hostel, library, as well as the labs, is very good. It provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, smart TVs, equipment in the labs, chemicals, etc. The food in the hostel is clean and hygienic with three meals a day from breakfast to dinner.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Best pharmacy college and ranks 2nd in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placements is nearly 30-40%. Companies like Cipla and Sanofi offer internships according to their needs. They offer salary packages ranging between 2 LPA - 3 LPA. The salary packages are based on the qualifications and knowledge of students who need to build by themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, and well-maintained labs by staff labs where students perform practicals. Our college conducts sports week in which they encourage students to play and participate in various games. Teachers also participate in various games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements; really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Percent:= 100% The highest: 6 Lacs The lowest: 4 Lacs Top recruiting companies are recommended. Ispor, NCC, HE, Excalibur, Tatva, Sphruti, etc. are the events that are organized during the course. All the best and good quality are there; you can enjoy all things, even the climate, which is much more enjoyable and lovable.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and washrooms, are all perfect. The quality and facilities in our hostel are, of course, the best in South India, and one thing about the climate is that it's much more awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement and good faculty in poona college of pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Every year, 70-80% of students are placed; the lowest package is 3.5 lacs for MPHARM and the highest is 8 lacs from companies such as Cipla, Iquvia, cognizant, and Sun Pharma. Seminar and practical work internships are also available for interested students.
review_content.Infrastructure: A well-developed Wi-Fi infrastructure is provided. Every floor of the hostel has a smart TV. Air conditioning is also provided in the hostel, as is good food, and all facilities are available to students, as well as proper knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: Ph.D. in Pharmaceutical Sciences - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good quality education.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good in our college. Students get internships in companies like LTI, Cipla, Sanofi, and Glenmark Pharmaceuticals. Few students get placement offers from companies in which they have done internships. Guest lectures of the industrial persons are arranged by the college to guide students about the current demands and scenarios of the industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Our campus is well-equipped with laboratories and digital classrooms with proper sitting arrangements. Library is big and has sufficient books and an area to study. Canteen is good with the large sitting arrangements. Ground is common for our campus with well-maintained facilities.

admission_overview.college_name: Poona College of Pharmacy Course Admissions 2025 : Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility, Selection Criteria & Dates

admission_overview.title: Poona College of Pharmacy Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Poona College of Pharmacy, Bharati Vidyapeeth admissions are offered to 13 courses at UG, PG and PhD courses in Pharmacy. The programmes include BPharm, PharmD, etc. Admission to most of the courses is entrance-based. Bharati Vidyapeeth conducts an online common entrance test for admission to some of the Pharmacy courses. Poona College of Pharmacy offers fellowship and scholarships to students who are deserving and in need of a scholarship.

eligibility_selection.title: Poona College of Pharmacy Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Poona College of Pharmacy has a variety of courses, each with its own eligibility criteria in terms of academic qualification and other entrance examinations. There are minimum percentage requirements necessary to be met by the candidates, which are lower in the case of reserved categories. The admission is done through entrance test results, which include ABON, BHPHA-II, PHARMPG and these are the national level exams. Admissions to the Pharmacy courses of the college are done based on university or national-level entrance exams. Below-mentioned are the Poona College of Pharmacy courses, along with the accepted entrance exam and fees: Course Name

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematic or Biology
BPharma with a minimum of 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST, teacher and sponsored category) or equivalent grade point from AICTE approved institution
Passed HSc or its equivalent examination with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematic or Biology with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)
Passed diploma course in Pharmacy from an institution approved by Pharmacy Council of India and a minimum of four-year Pharmacy practice experience in a community or hospital

HSc examination of Maharashtra State Board of Secondary and Higher education or its equivalent examination with Science subjects Diploma in Pharmacy with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in case of Backward Class Category belonging only to Maharashtra)

Master's degree or a professional degree declared equivalent to the master's degree by the corresponding statutory regulatory body, with at least 55% aggregate or its equivalent grade 'B' in the UGC 7-point scale

admission_process.title: Poona College of Pharmacy Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Poona College of Pharmacy is a college of pharmacy that admits numerous UG and postgraduate as well as doctorate degrees in the arena of pharmacy.It has entrance-based admission where the potential candidates shall qualify in the eligibility criteria of their particular course.It is selected by a university-level or a national-level entrance examination then by means of documents examination and paying the fee.
Step 1: Poona College of Pharmacy Application Process

Candidates who want to join Poona College of Pharmacy should apply on the college website or as directed by the college.The application form should be completed with the personal data and academic information, as well as supporting documents.It also needs to be registered in the entrance exams of courses such as BPharm and PharmD.The aspirants need to appear in appropriate exams like ABON with GPAT or PHARMPG or national exams.
Step 2: Entrance Test and Selection

All the admissions to different pharmacy courses in Poona College of Pharmacy are purely based on entrance.The selection for undergraduate degree studies, such as BPharm and PharmD, is carried out based on the ABON computer-based entrance test scores.In MPharm and PharmD (PB), the selection process takes place through GPAT or PHARMPG, whereas admission to PhD follows national-level testing such as UGC-NET, GATE, CSIR-NET or All India Entrance Test.Shortlisting is based on eligibility and performance in these exams.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

After selection, candidates are notified by the college to proceed with final admission formalities. This includes verification of original documents and payment of the course-specific tuition fee to confirm their seat. Failure to comply within the stipulated time may result in cancellation of the allotted seat. Admission is granted only after fulfilling all academic, entrance, andPoona College of Pharmacy fee.

paragraphs: The Poona College of Pharmacy placement report is yet to be released for the batch passing out in 2024. However, the college has released the NIRF report 2024 on its official website. According to the report, 72 BPharma and 86 MPharma students were placed during 2023 placements. Further, the median package offered to the BPharma and MPharma students during Poona College of Pharmacy placements 2023 was INR 3.60 LPA and INR 4.10 LPA , respectively. The leading recruiters of Poona College of Pharmacy placements over the past few years included Biocon, Biologics, Cognizant, Healthosphere, TCS, etc.

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing BPharm from Poona College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: In recent times, a government job is more preferable than a private job. After completing a four-year BPharm degree course from Poona College of Pharmacy, candidates have various options that they can pursue, such as a government hospital Pharmacist, Drug Inspector, Drug squad in police, Drug squad in police, Regulatory Affairs Officer, etc. To get these job roles, candidates are required to qualify for government exams, such as UPSC, SPSC, SSC, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Poona College of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Poona College of Pharmacy has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostels provide neat and clean rooms with proper ventilation and light. Quality food is provided in the mess. The institute maintains strict discipline in the hostels.

library.description: Poona College of Pharmacy library has a vast collection of 21743 books, 13 journals, 7636 e-journals and 76909 e-books. Online databases such as J-Gate, N-list, Micromedex are subscribed and available to the library members. This helps the faculty members and students to keep themselves abreast of recent developments in the pharmaceutical sciences. The entire library operations including Acquisition, Cataloguing, Circulation, OPAC, Memberships, reports etc. are computerized and books have been barcoded. The library has SOUL 2.0 library management system, which is developed by INFLIBNET Centre, Gandhinagar, an Inter-University Centre of UGC, India. The library has well ventilated and furnished reading hall.

The library has well ventilated and furnished reading hall.

hostel.description: Poona College of Pharmacy has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostels provide neat and clean rooms with proper ventilation and light. Quality food is provided in the mess. The institute maintains strict discipline in the hostels.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Public Testing Lab, Plant Tissue Culture Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, like it is well disciplined and well maintained. Classroom labs are well cleaned, well sanitized, and also very clean. Mess is also okay. Sometimes they give good food like good bhajis and all. Sometimes the quality is not good from our mess.

reviews.review_heading: Pharm D with the best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college, hostel, library, as well as the labs, is very good. It provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, smart TVs, equipment in the labs, chemicals, etc. The food in the hostel is clean and hygienic with three meals a day from breakfast to dinner.

reviews.review_heading: Best pharmacy college and ranks 2nd in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, and well-maintained labs by staff labs where students perform practicals. Our college conducts sports week in which they encourage students to play and participate in various games. Teachers also participate in various games.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements; really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and washrooms, are all perfect. The quality and facilities in our hostel are, of course, the best in South India, and one thing about the climate is that it's much more awesome.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and good faculty in poona college of pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: A well-developed Wi-Fi infrastructure is provided. Every floor of the hostel has a smart TV. Air conditioning is also provided in the hostel, as is good food, and all facilities are available to students, as well as proper knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good quality education.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Our campus is well-equipped with laboratories and digital classrooms with proper sitting arrangements. Library is big and has sufficient books and an area to study. Canteen is good with the large sitting arrangements. Ground is common for our campus with well-maintained facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review on Government college of pharmacy in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The lab and classroom in college are very advanced with high-tech equipment. Also, well-maintenance workshops are available in college. There is a mess and canteen that provides good food. Also, hostels facility available on the college campus. There is a separate college parking available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure and campus.
reviews.review_text: The college environment is quite good and there are separate laboratories for practicals. Classrooms are big, and the college library has the latest books for students. Poona College of Pharmacy has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostels provide neat and clean rooms. Quality food is provided in the mess. There are security guards at the gates. Both the hostels for boys and girls are on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Poona College of Pharmacy, Bharati Vidyapeeth.
reviews.review_text: The campus does not provide a Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are decent, but not too great. There are digital classrooms, but most of the teachers are not efficient enough to make good use out of them. Hostel available on the campus cannot give you proper accommodation as there are colleges of different fields as well and its capacity does not match to the requirements. The mess on the campus is below the standards, but you can get a great variety and taste of food just outside the campus. The i...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped. The library has all the books. They try to add on new books every year. Classrooms are pretty decent, with proper ventilation and furniture. Wi-Fi and network is an issue here. The classrooms aren't Wi-Fi enabled. I didn't opt for any hostel or mess facilities, so I cannot comment on it.

reviews.review_heading: Bharati Vidyapeeth provides quality education from KG to PG.
reviews.review_text: The institute is well-known for its infrastructure. The campus is well-equipped with all modern amenities. Advance laboratories and computer labs are available in the college. Immediate medical assistance is available in the college. Hostel facilities are expensive but are available with all the required and necessary amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Best premises and staff with Placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi, library, gymnasium facilities. The college has extraordinary labs and classrooms with two auditorium halls. We have elevator facility for M. pharma building. Good and hygienic canteen facility and provide good quality of food. Overall premises are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Good college campus. Average faculty members. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college building is very huge and in good condition. Quality of labs is excellent. There is a huge library for students along with Wi-Fi facility. Air conditioned classrooms are spacious and bright. Canteen is not that good. Quality of food is bad. Hostel rooms are also average and the food is bad too.

reviews.review_heading: It is a pharmacy college where one can try here.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good and spacious. The laboratories are good with all the latest instruments and apparatus. Our college arranges a cricket tournament every year called as pharmacy cup. This year, it was our 32nd pharmacy cup in which colleges from all over Maharashtra taken part.

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent compared to the other pharmacy colleges in Pune.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Poona College of Pharmacy is excellent. It is NAAC accredited A grade and NBA accredited A grade too. The laboratories, the library, and the classrooms are good. You get the books in the book bank scheme to study. The Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus.

faqs.answer: A:    SAHS (School of Allied Health Sciences) at Sharda University accepts various entrance exam scores for admission to its programs. For M.Sc, the university accepts scores from the Sharda University Admission Test (SUAT) and other national-level entrance exams.These national-level exams include JEE, CLAT, CAT, MAT, XAT, NATA, and NEET. Additionally, the university also accepts Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam scores for various undergraduate courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied, but the college life I had was amazing.

review_content.Placements: The placement in my course was almost zero. The highest package offered was 4 LPA, and the average was 2 LPA. Apollo and Nestle were among the recruiters. About 60% of students got internships at Sharda Hospital and Nestle. Most students pursued roles as nutritionists. Sharda University was known for fun and other activities, but being a private university, students had to work hard for their success.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities were top-notch, with everything available except for course-related books in the library. I preferred not to stay in Sharda's hostel because the food quality was very bad. However, for those who wanted to enjoy college life, staying in the hostel was an option.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Head to Sharda University.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in Sharda University in my course, BPT, is around 2-4 LPA. If we talk about the highest package in BPT, it is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is around 1.5 LPA. In the list of top recruiting companies is Birla Precision Technology. A minimum of 40% of students got internships from my course, and if I remember correctly, one of my seniors got an internship at BPT International. The roles offered in our course are Clinical Physiotherapist in hospitals and clinics.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available for us in college are very good, including well-ventilated classrooms and lab rooms with air conditioning, a very spacious library, neat and clean washrooms, and corridors, along with the best Wi-Fi connection. In the university hostel, there are many facilities available for us, such as laundry, healthy food, Wi-Fi connection, and clean rooms and washrooms.

faqs.answer: The Sharda University School of Science (SHSS) offers B.Sc programs. The eligibility criteria for B.Sc in Sharda University Admission Test (SUAT) is 75% and above.Additionally, the university offers scholarships based on the CUET (UG) percentile score, with a 50% scholarship for percentiles between 85.00 - 94.99 and a 100% scholarship for percentiles of 95.00 and above.Therefore, it is possible to get admission to B.Sc at SHSS, Sharda University with a 75 percentile in CUET.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get B.Sc at SAHS Sharda University with 75 percentile in CUET?

faqs.answer: In order to get admission to the BSc course at SAHS Sharda University, candidates have to go through a selection process. The selection criteria for BSc is inclusive of fulfilling the basic requirements of Sharda University eligibility criteria, qualifying for the respective entrance exam and appearing in Personal Interview round. Find below the complete Sharda University BSc admission process:Fulfilling Eligibility Criteria: Class 12 with a minimum 50% PCM/PCB aggregate from a recognised board.Qualifying Entrance Exam: Qualify for either Sharda University Entrance Exam (SUAT) or apply via a valid national-level exam.Appearing for Personal Interview Round: Those who apply via SUAT scores are required to appear for a PI round conducted at Sharda School of Allied Health Sciences.Filling the Application Form: Eligible candidates must fill an online application form to apply for the Sharda University BSc course.

overview_faqs.question: What is the BSc fees at SAHS Sharda University?
overview_faqs.answer: SAHS Sharda University BSc fees ranges between INR 4.9 Lacs - INR 6.7 lakh, as per the course specialisations. Candidates must pay the fee once they receives the provisional admission letter. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Sharda University MBBS fee. There are other fee components that students need to pay during the course fee submission such as Application Fee at the time of filling out the form, Hostel Fee, Security Deposit, etc.

overview_faqs.question: Is SAHS Sharda University a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, SAHS is a good option. As this college have lot of advantages. The major plus point of this college is, it is situated in Uttar Pradesh's Greater Noida. Founded in 2009 and grants two-year Master of Architecture degrees in addition to five-year Bachelor of Architecture degrees.Architects with academic credentials and professional experience make up the faculty. The ratio of students to faculty is excellent.The facilities on campus, such as the library, labs, and studios, are first-rate. The curriculum emphasizes theoretical subjects, software skills, site visits, design studio projects, etc.Students are placed in construction companies, architecture firms, etc., which is a respectable placement rate. A few students pursue further education.But in comparison to some other architecture colleges, the fees are a little bit higher.

overview_faqs.question: Is BPT available at School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BPT course is available at School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University. SSchool of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University offers a four and half year BPT course at the UG level. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of four and half years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass Class 12 to apply for the BPT course.

review_summary.college_name: SAHS Sharda University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Cardiovascular Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Sharda University life including our huge campus, B.Sc. Students in block 4.

content.Placements: As this course is new, the placement rate is average depending on your knowledge solely but the internship rate is quite high and quality is good to attain knowledge because the university itself has a hospital. It provides an opportunity to work and gain experience.
content.Infrastructure: Though college hostels aren't that good the campus life is all stars and moon and perfect. The library is the best. Classrooms are good. Labs are also maintained. Wi-Fi also works quite fine. There are many facilities in the university. Love it for real because it exceeds my expectations.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Optometry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, and teachers are the best and most cooperative.

content.Placements: I was currently in the optometry course, and my batchmates were also good. About my course, if you completed optometry, you could become an optometrist. You could check patients' eyes and learn about diseases in this course. In the hospital, you will be the first to check the eyes of the patients, and then you could suggest they go to an ophthalmologist.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Sharda University was massive. Students get surprised when they enter the college, and it felt like the dream college you see daily on television. Classrooms were excellent, and they provided projectors for studying. Teachers were good and cooperative.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied, but the college life I had was amazing.

content.Placements: The placement in my course was almost zero. The highest package offered was 4 LPA, and the average was 2 LPA. Apollo and Nestle were among the recruiters. About 60% of students got internships at Sharda Hospital and Nestle. Most students pursued roles as nutritionists. Sharda University was known for fun and other activities, but being a private university, students had to work hard for their success.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities were top-notch, with everything available except for course-related books in the library. I preferred not to stay in Sharda's hostel because the food quality was very bad. However, for those who wanted to enjoy college life, staying in the hostel was an option.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Head to Sharda University.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in Sharda University in my course, BPT, is around 2-4 LPA. If we talk about the highest package in BPT, it is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is around 1.5 LPA. In the list of top recruiting companies is Birla Precision Technology. A minimum of 40% of students got internships from my course, and if I remember correctly, one of my seniors got an internship at BPT International. The roles offered in our course are Clinical Physiotherapist in hospitals and clinics.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available for us in college are very good, including well-ventilated classrooms and lab rooms with air conditioning, a very spacious library, neat and clean washrooms, and corridors, along with the best Wi-Fi connection. In the university hostel, there are many facilities available for us, such as laundry, healthy food, Wi-Fi connection, and clean rooms and washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Sharda University: world is here, where are you!

content.Placements: Most of the students open their own clinic. And others are placed at well-known hospitals like Apollo Hospital, Ram Manohar Lohiya Hospital, and others are doing their masters from Sharda University after completing their bachelors degree. Overall, the passed students are well placed.
content.Infrastructure: The university infrastructure is very cool. The classroom is highly equipped with projectors, etc., and the labs are very nice and clean. There are a total of 6 hostels for boys and girls. The quality of food is awesome. The university has it's own hospital. And the various types of sports activities are performed like badminton, cricket, volleyball, football, etc. Many of the students are selected as nationals from our university.

admission_overview.title: School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University admissions 2025 are entirely entrance-based. Candidates are offered courses such as BSc, BPT, MSc, MPT, etc., at UG and PG-level. Admissions are offered to candidates via SUAT, which is an in-house entrance exam of Sharda University. Aspirants can also apply via CUET UG scores for the respective courses such as BSc and BPT. After qualifying for any of the mentioned entrance exams, candidates have to appear for a PI round. Read more about the School of Allied Health, Sharda University admissions 2025 in the below article.

eligibility_selection.title: School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University Eligibility & Selection 2025

Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for all SAHS, Sharda University courses:

admission_process.title: School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in the SAHS:
STEP 1: School of Allied Health Sciences, Sharda University Application Process 2025
Aspirants can apply for various courses at the official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The selection criteria at SAHS are based on entrance exam scores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification as per the respective courses set by the college. Students are selected based on the entrance exam of SUAT + PI/CUET scores as per respective courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Can I get B.Sc at SAHS Sharda University with 75 percentile in CUET?
faqs.answer: The Sharda University School of Science (SHSS) offers B.Sc programs. The eligibility criteria for B.Sc in Sharda University Admission Test (SUAT) is 75% and above.Additionally, the university offers scholarships based on the CUET (UG) percentile score, with a 50% scholarship for percentiles between 85.00 - 94.99 and a 100% scholarship for percentiles of 95.00 and above.Therefore, it is possible to get admission to B.Sc at SHSS, Sharda University with a 75 percentile in CUET.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission at SAHS Sharda University BSc course?
faqs.answer: Admission to SAHS Sharda University BSc course is done by taking the entrance exam, i.e., SUAT (Sharda University Admission Test), an in-house entrance. However, candidates with a valid score in national level exam are exempted from the in-house exam. Further, the students must have passedClass 12 with a minimum 50% PCM/PCB aggregate from a recognised board. Therefore, direct admission to the BSc course is not applicable at SAHS Sharda University.

faqs.question: When will SUAT application form be available?
faqs.answer: SUAT 2026 application form is available online. To participate in entrance exam and admission, candidates will have to submit application form. After last date, authorities will not accept applications. Required details have to be submitted in SUAT application form.

faqs.question: When will SUAT result be announced?
faqs.answer: The official SUAT 2026 result date has not been announced yet. Candidates will be able to check obtained scores and ranks through the SUAT result. The authorities are expected to release the SUAT result tentatively a few days after the examination is conducted. SUAT result will be declared online and no other mode will be used to announce the scores.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at SAHS Sharda University?
faqs.answer: The highest package that SAHS Sharda University offered in 2022 was INR 45 LPA. In 2022, the average package was INR 5.65 LPA. The university offers a systematic placement process, with over 450 organizations recruiting students from a variety of specialties. In 2022, the university achieved 100% placement for its MBA students. In 2023, Sharda University's MBA in Marketing program received the highest proportion of placements. The highest salary package offered for B.Tech students is 65 LPA, while biotechnology students receive 20 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the BSc fees at SAHS Sharda University?
faqs.answer: SAHS Sharda University BSc fees ranges between INR 4.9 Lacs - INR 6.7 lakh , as per the course specialisations. Candidates must pay the fee once they receives the provisional admission letter. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Sharda University MBBS fee. There are other fee components that students need to pay during the course fee submission such as Application Fee at the time of filling out the form, Hostel Fee, Security Deposit, etc.

faqs.question: Can I pay the SUAT application fee offline?
faqs.answer: Yes. The candidates will be able to pay the SUAT application fee offline. To make the offline payment, the candidates will have to draw a demand draft in favour of Sharda University payable at Greater Noida. Candidates will have to write their name, father's name, contact number, and course opted for a the back of the demand draft and send it to the Admission Cell, Sharda University, Plot No. 32-34, Knowledge Park III, Greater Noida, UP - 201306. The fee can also be paid through cash at the Sharda University campus/regional offices.

faqs.question: How costly is SAHS Sharda University?
faqs.answer: The first-year fees in INR for the following courses at Sharda University's School of Allied Health Sciences (SAHS) are: B.Sc: 1.3 lakhs M.P.T: 1.5 lakhs M.Sc: 1.24 lakhs Ph.D: 75,000 Eligibility for these courses is: B.Sc: 10+2 with 50% M.P.T: B.P.T. with 50% M.Sc: Graduation with 55% Ph.D.: Post Graduation with 55% Sharda University also offers a Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) program, which costs INR 8.37 Lacs for four years. Sharda University's School of Medical Sciences and Research also offers an MBBS program, which costs INR12,69,319 per student.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Sharda University was massive. Students get surprised when they enter the college, and it felt like the dream college you see daily on television. Classrooms were excellent, and they provided projectors for studying. Teachers were good and cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied, but the college life I had was amazing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities were top-notch, with everything available except for course-related books in the library. I preferred not to stay in Sharda's hostel because the food quality was very bad. However, for those who wanted to enjoy college life, staying in the hostel was an option.

reviews.review_heading: Head to Sharda University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for us in college are very good, including well-ventilated classrooms and lab rooms with air conditioning, a very spacious library, neat and clean washrooms, and corridors, along with the best Wi-Fi connection. In the university hostel, there are many facilities available for us, such as laundry, healthy food, Wi-Fi connection, and clean rooms and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Sharda University: world is here, where are you!
reviews.review_text:
The university infrastructure is very cool. The classroom is highly equipped with projectors, etc., and the labs are very nice and clean.
There are a total of 6 hostels for boys and girls. The quality of food is awesome. The university has it's own hospital.
And the various types of sports activities are performed like badminton, cricket, volleyball, football, etc. Many of the students are selected as nationals from our university.

reviews.review_heading: Good Private College for Forensic Science Course Compared to Other Colleges.
reviews.review_text: The library has all the necessary books, and the classrooms are air-conditioned with a digitalized system of learning. We have good libraries, but they are smaller than the classrooms, which have various facilities, including Wi-Fi and digital systems. The food is good in some hostels, but not in all. The prices for hostel accommodations are a bit high. The facilities for games and medical services are also good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and faculty members are cooperative.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available are good, like the Wi-Fi labs and the facilities are quite good. Overall, the facilities provided are good and the environment of the faculty members is good. Everything is good except the placement part and placement is the main.

reviews.review_heading: Sharda University: The world is here, where are you?
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and contains all sorts of accommodation. The campus is very big. Talking about the hostel, the mess food is not up to the mark but Wi-Fi and electricity is always available. There is no problem with the internet in the rooms here. But the hostel wardens are very rude. Medical facility is available 24 hours at Sharda Hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Things that the Sharda University website won't tell you.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Sharda University is simply amazing. All the classrooms are well-furnished with AC and Wi-Fi connections. Sharda is well known for its extracurricular activities. Each block has its own library, which has books related to the block studies. There is also the main library, which is huge, beautiful, and provides a pretty environment for studying.

reviews.review_heading: A good atmosphere to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: College buildings are well conditioned, but hostels are not good or even affordable. Out Campus hostels are much better and more affordable (more facilities at a low cost). The hostel provides mattresses. It is overpriced, and the washroom service and food quality are not even good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members and placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure could not be something to complain about. Sharda University had the best infrastructure in Uttar Pradesh. The Wi-Fi connectivity was impeccable. Labs and classrooms were outstanding. The library was world-class.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent and clean. Our college provides us with all facilities. The food served in the canteen is good and hygienic. There is a stationery shop outside our college. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college has a library.

reviews.review_heading: A good ranking by NAAC with good placements. Best infrastructure in Noida.
reviews.review_text: Best thing about college is infrastructure with four floors fully Wi-Fi supported. Every building is having there own labs, library and canteen with minimal charges. Hostels are well maintained washrooms are good, mess food are very good and hygein for parents a guest room is provided, twenty four into seven medical support, their are four hostels and every hostels are having there separate sports Complex with coaches.

reviews.review_heading: Sharda University is the best for placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Sharda University has very good facilities and infrastructure. The library is the best and has good books. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Sharda University is one of the best universities in India.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere for students and staff. The library is open for all students, according to their course there are many libraries in one building. Full air-conditioned classroom and CCTV camera is available everywhere, except classes and canteen.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Amrita School of Medicine, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Kochi Campus:

placements.overview: Amrita School of Medicine, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham - Kochi Campus, located in Kochi, Kerala, is a renowned educational institution. The institute offers a wide range of Degree programmes at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. These courses are offered to students in Full Time mode across various fields, including Medicine & Health Sciences. Some of the most popular programme offered at the institute are MBBS, DM, M.Ch., MD and MS. The institute strive to provide quality education to students at an affordable fee to make it accessible for meritorious students. The institute has a group of experienced and professional faculty members to offer valuable education to students. In addition to this, the institute campus offers a modern infrastructure to students and caters to all their needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really suggestable college, extremely good quality of education and infrastructure facilities.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2022 MBBS batch. I am sure that if you graduate from Amrita, there is no doubt about your placement. Moreover, after being an MBBS graduate, there is no point in talking about placement percentages. We have our alumni even in international sports teams working as Sports Physicians.
review_content.Infrastructure: All lecture halls are air-conditioned. There are dedicated audio systems in all lecture halls. Lecture halls are well ventilated and equipped with good lighting systems. Seating arrangements are excellent, with completely cushioned seats. There are separate labs in all departments, which are equipped with state-of-the-art facilities. All labs are well furnished with the most modern equipment. We have a huge library with all sorts of references, journals, etc. The library can easily accommodate more than 150 students at a time and is equipped with modern computers. Hostel facilities are well above the mark, with dedicated study halls that are air-conditioned. The food given in the hostel and on campus is pure vegetarian only. I must say that the quality of food is not up to the mark. The menu is not much recommendable. We have all sorts of sports equipment in the hostel, along with a gymnasium. The entire campus, along with the hostel, is always under CCTV surveillance. Ragging is strictly prohibited on campus and in the hostel, and defaulters will be directly brought in front of the law.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best private college for Medical courses.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered is Rs.30 Lacs per year for NRI quota and Rs.18 to 20 Lacs for general quota students. 90% of the students go for PG entrance exams, rest get placements in a good hospital including Aster, AIIMS, KIMS. Job placement for students from Amrita is 100% as it is a very reputed college and they also have a tie ups with Cambridge University.
review_content.Infrastructure: The School of Medicine building provides houses, laboratories, lecture halls and a well-furnished central library complete with an outstanding collection of the latest editions of international and Indian medical books and journals. It also provides electronic access to many scientific and medical databases in India and abroad. An Anatomy Museum has been established with all the latest teaching devices with elaborate models detailing the different parts of the human body. The library has computer facilities with internet. There is no Wi-Fi in the campus or hostel. Hostel has good facilities with an accommodation of 3 people in a room in first year and 2 people in a room from second year. The rooms are pretty spacious. Gym facility is available in the hostel. Food in the mess is average and lastly there is a basketball ball court in the hostel and a cafe too.

reviews_list.batch_info: DM in Endocrinology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Interesting phase of my studies.

review_content.Placements: Most students after graduation look for some other master's courses to prepare them with specialized in any of the particular courses. Instead, students also got placed in various private institutions like Nomad Health, and HCG with good salary packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college was well-equipped with various technologies, diagnostic centers, and simulation laboratories. Also, hospitals are present within the campus which should make it easier for the students to attend training and practical classes without any external disturbances.

faqs.answer: Sharda Medical College under Sharda University offers six degree courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The courses include MBBS, MD, MS and MSc. PhD is also offered in the medical stream at SMSR, Sharda University. Candidates who have completed Class 12 can apply for UG courses. Graduation is necessary to apply for PG courses.
faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at Sharda Medical College?

faqs.answer: Sharda Medical College admission to MBBS course is based on NEET UG score. Shortlisted candidates are further called for UP State Government online counselling process conducted by "Director General Medical Education of Uttar Pradesh '. The eligibility for MBBS is as per NMC Guidelines.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission to MBBS course at Sharda Medical College?

faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass MBBS degree awarded by a university recognised by the Medical Council of India and must have completed the required period of internship in a recognised hospital to apply for Sharda Medical College MS course. Additionally, aspirants must also qualify NEET PG followed by UP State Government Counselling for admission.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility for MS at Sharda Medical College?

faqs.answer: MSc is a two-year course divided into four semesters. Sharda Medical College offers MSc in below-mentioned specialisations:Medical AnatomyMedical Bio ChemistryMedical MicrobiologyMedical PharmacologyMedical Physiology

review_summary.college_name: Sharda Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MD in Anesthesia - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of my college.

content.Placements: The college provides excellent opportunities to its students. There are internships for students so that they can develop their skills and be prepared for the future. There are also placements for students by various medical firms. Our college provides the best placements depending on the caliber of students and their potential. Every student is allowed to sit in the interview and give their best. Faculty members train us well enough for the interview round.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is on the college premises but now the hostel building has been transformed into an administrative block and for now. There are no facilities like a hostel. But there is a college canteen inside the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good and all the facilities are provided here.

content.Placements: From SMSR, all MBBS medical graduates easily get a job as a junior president in any hospital with a salary of Rs. 60,000 per month in UP and Rs. 90,000 per month in Delhi. It is mandatory to complete one year of internship at Sharda Hospital only with a stipend of Rs. 7,000 for 1st 3 months, Rs. 8,000 for the next 3 months, Rs. 9,000 for another 3 months, and Rs. 10,000 for the last 3 months.
content.Infrastructure: In SMSR, all facilities are well provided. It has a 24x7 library. The infrastructure is well-developed such as a physiology lab, pathology lab, etc. It has around 1,800 bed in the hospital. Hostel rooms are also good with proper hygiene. The mess food is of average quality.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The university has good infrastructure and a pleasant environment that helps settle our lives well.

content.Placements: Sharda University has a qualification rate of 99.7%. Placements are offered in community health centers, general physician roles, etc. Recruiting companies include Medanta, Apollo, and Nax Hospital. Students are placed at good packages. 100% of students get their internships exclusively from Sharda Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel life is excellent, with quality mess food provided, including two breakfast meals, one lunch, and one dinner. We are also provided with high-speed Wi-Fi, ensuring that our studies are uninterrupted. The library is one of the most peaceful places on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good medical college, if you prefer in the NCR.

content.Placements: Most of the students usually join as JR in a sharda hospital in itself or in a nearby hospital. Or else they start preparing for NEET PG. The paygrade for JRs is also good. But the amount of stipend paid for interns is much lower. It's just 7,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is actually good. It is up to par. All the hostels have attached washrooms. The campus is connected with Wi-Fi service. Food in the mess is good. Laundry is also provided by the university itself. They have a complete building dedicated to sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Multicultural Vibrant Campus .

content.Placements: I was from the 2017 batch; since it was an MBBS, the majority took a drop for NEET PG. The one who joined the job got paid 65,000/month in Sharda Hospital itself; some got into Delhi Hospital and had a salary around 1L per month. 4 took college in NEET PG directly. Job situation is bit saturated in Sharda hospital, especially if some batch is passing out of that college since they prefer students from their own college like any other college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels were well-equipped, with Wi-Fi, entertainment rooms, and mess on the ground floor. As of infrastructure, it is one of the best in the whole Delhi NCR, better than Amity or any other college, only lacking in space and greenery compared to DU colleges.

School of Medical Sciences and Research (SMSR), Sharda University NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the MBBS course. The institute offers admission to the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the School of Medical Sciences and Research (SMSR), Sharda University 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank f

As per the School of Medical Sciences and Research (SMSR), Sharda University MBBS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 35532 for the General HS category students. The cutoff for the same course was 110819 in 2023 and 109588 in 2022 for admission. So, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, MBBS saw inconsistency in its last-round closing ranks for the students belonging to the General HS category.

School of Medical Sciences and Research (SMSR), Sharda University accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the MBBS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to School of Medical Sciences and Research (SMSR), Sharda University.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sharda Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is on the college premises but now the hostel building has been transformed into an administrative block and for now. There are no facilities like a hostel. But there is a college canteen inside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good and all the facilities are provided here.
reviews.review_text: In SMSR, all facilities are well provided. It has a 24x7 library. The infrastructure is well-developed such as a physiology lab, pathology lab, etc. It has around 1,800 bed in the hospital. Hostel rooms are also good with proper hygiene. The mess food is of average quality.

reviews.review_heading: The university has good infrastructure and a pleasant environment that helps settle our lives well.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life is excellent, with quality mess food provided, including two breakfast meals, one lunch, and one dinner. We are also provided with high-speed Wi-Fi, ensuring that our studies are uninterrupted. The library is one of the most peaceful places on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good medical college, if you prefer in the NCR.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is actually good. It is up to par. All the hostels have attached washrooms. The campus is connected with Wi-Fi service. Food in the mess is good. Laundry is also provided by the university itself. They have a complete building dedicated to sports.

reviews.review_heading: Multicultural Vibrant Campus .
reviews.review_text: Hostels were well-equipped, with Wi-Fi, entertainment rooms, and mess on the ground floor. As of infrastructure, it is one of the best in the whole Delhi NCR, better than Amity or any other college, only lacking in space and greenery compared to DU colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to study MBBS.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is present throughout the hostel and the college lecture halls are well lit and have centralized air conditioning. The girl hostel is okay, I guess. Apart from its location, the mess is nice and the quality of food is better than other hostels. There is a study room but no recreational rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best decision to come here, and provides best teachers and placements.
reviews.review_text: It provides well-maintained 5 lecture halls, 2 libraries, 2 laboratories, 1 dissection hall. It provides good speed in Wi-Fi 24X7. Hostel has a Wi-Fi facility, and they provide with cupboard, air conditioner, study table separately for each student. Two students are accommodated in one room. The quality of food is average. The canteen is available. It also provides hospitals in universities. Games and sports activities are also adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure, faculty, discipline, clean environment, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Sharda University is awesome. It is the top university in UP. The maximum number of different courses are available. There are different buildings for different programs. All the lecture halls are well-maintained, well-developed and air-conditioned. There are four basketball courts, two volleyball courts, 8 badminton courts, one football ground, and one cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and exposure. Placements are moderately good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is really good. Business building is the best. From ACs, projectors, labs, food, shops to grounds, the overall environment and infrastructure of the university are really very good. You will find people from different countries and local Gujjars here.

reviews.review_heading: Overal, there is a good infrastructure, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Sharda is spread over 63 acres. In Sharda, there is a different hostel for international students. The Sharda also provides medical facilities to every student. Classrooms are also very big at Sharda University.

reviews.review_heading: Best medical college in Delhi NCR with best infrastructure and teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: It has one of the best infrastructures that a medical college could have, and we had the highest number of cadavers for our anatomy classes. The patient load at the hospital is also good which enables you to sharpen your clinical skills. The college also organises regular CME's and conferences with foreign lecturers to update about the latest research in medical field. The lecture halls were well-equipped with a seating capacity of 200 although 150 MBBS seats are allotted to the college.

reviews.review_heading: The world is here at the Sharda University, and where are you.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good at Sharda University. The Wi-Fi networks are available throughout the campus. The labs and the classrooms are good. The sports infrastructure is excellent. The hostel rooms are fine. The quality of food available in the canteen is up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with experienced teachers and quite extensive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great with very good on-campus life. All the buildings are equipped with free Wi-Fi for the students and faculty members. Sharda University has its own hospital that too within the campus which provides great medical facilities. Classrooms and the library are air-conditioned and teaching methods are very good. The sports society is also very nice with coaches for every sport.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with good enviroment and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Sharda University has one of the best infrastructures in the country. It has well-equipped digital classrooms. The building is well-designed with the spacious classroom. The library is fully air-conditioned and has an uncountable number of books. This college has a good auditorium and playground. The sports department is also good here.

reviews.review_heading: Best university in my view, and we will also enjoy it. Best study environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college has best infrastructure when compared to other colleges. Smart classes and Wi-Fi are also available in hostels and library. Food is good and has different varieties in a week. There are 3-4 messes and a big canteen. All sports are played here with a good coach.

Babu Banarasi Das University admissions 2026 are currently open for all courses. Interested candidates can go to the official website to apply to the desired course.

The CUET PG exam 2026 will be conducted from Mar 6 to Mar 27, 2026, for admission to several PG courses.

college_info.intro:
Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow consists of more than 10 schools, including the School of Engineering, the School of Management, the School of Legal Studies and the School of Computer Applications, among others. BBDU Lucknow offers various UG, PG, certificate, and PhD courses, across many streams such as management, technology, engineering sciences, legal studies, education, and humanities, among others.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular offerings at the university. Baba Banarasi Das University offers the BTech programme in several specialisations, such as Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The popularity of the BTech programme offered at BBDU is attributed to its state-of-the-art engineering school equipped with both modern and traditional ways of learning and excellent faculty. The BTech graduates of BBD University Lucknow are placed in top-notch companies such as Infosys, Ola, TCS, Sony, Godrej, and many more.
Below mentioned are some of the most popular BBD University Lucknow courses, along with eligibility, selection criteria, and BBDU Lucknow fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Babu Banarasi Das University admissions are offered through merit and entrance. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as CLAT, CAT, etc., for admission to specific courses. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to secure a seat at the University. The University considers exams such as MAT/ XAT/ CAT/CMAT/ATMA/GMAT and others. Candidates must meet the cutoff and get shortlisted for the final admission. For final admission, candidates must pay the fees and confirm
faqs.question: Is Babu Banarasi Das University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    The total course fee for BBA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 4.2 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to BBDU BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50%-55% aggregate to apply for BBA course. The fee for BBA varies as per the specialisation. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BBA at BBDU?

faqs.answer: A:    The lateral entry into the BTech programme at BBDU needs the applicant to have completed a three-year Diploma or a BSc Diploma in Mathematics and have a minimum aggregate of 50. This one-of-a-kind route gives people who have acquired previous academic experience to enter the programme at a later stage.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for lateral entry at BBDU Lucknow?

faqs.answer: A:    Babu Banarasi Das University offers courses at the UG, PG, PhD, and Certificate levels. The University offers respective courses on the basis of merit and entrance exam. The fee structure of the respective courses includes a total tuition fees ranging from INR 4.5 K to INR 21.8 Lakh. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of the minimum aggregate secured in Class 12 and graduation along with accepted entrance scores.

review_summary.college_name: BBDU Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.

content.Placements: 5 to 10 percent of students are placed in college. The highest package of BBD is 48 LPA in Microsoft btech. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top companies are Microsoft accenture google Flipkart, Cisco, Amazon, TCS etc. 20 to 30 percent of students got intership. The role of the course is to offer b tech and other courses.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.

content.Placements: There are low placements, so we have to get placements on our own capabilities. Only relying on the university will not get us placed. We can expect students to get a package ranging from 2-3 LPA only. Companies that come for placements are HCL, Infosys, etc. We can get internships at IBM, but it's completely based on our skills.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Lucknow.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed. The highest is 12 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Very few got internships from my B.Tech CS course. Many groups offer their role in maintaining the extra curricular activities. You can take part in one of those groups to be a member of it and experience how the management works in different situations.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Lucknow.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA. A very few got internships from my B.Tech CS course. Many groups offer their role in maintaining the extra curricular activities. You can take part in one of those groups to be a member of it and experience how the management works in different situations.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.

content.Placements: Almost every year, 70-80 percent of students get placements. 23-24 LPA is the highest package, the average packages are 3 to 4 LPA, and the mean is 12 to 13 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, etc. are the top companies and recruiters which come in the college for placements. On an average, 32-40% from my course got internships in companies like HCL and Cognizant. The top roles offered are assistant manager, project manager, data analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs. Classes are well-equipped with modern design and devices, such as smart boards, and well-maintained furniture like tables and chairs. Generally, the food is good, and on any special occasion, they bring better food with deluxe parties. The sports facilities are well maintained with good opportunities, welcoming the students to show their talent.

admission_process.title: Babu Banarasi Das University  Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Babu Banaras Das University admission 2025is currently open. Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like CLAT, CAT, etc., for admission to specific courses.BBD Universityoffers more than 25 courses through 11 schools at UG, PG, certificate and doctoral levels. The mode ofBabuBanarasi Das University course admissionsis primarilyonline.

Admission to BBDU is based on merit and entrance. The University offers courses such asBTech, BSc, BDS, BBA, LLB,etc. at theUG leveland theMBA, MTech, MSc, MCA programmes, etc. at thePG level. Candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses at BBDU. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria forBabuBanarasi Das University course admissions2025:
Graduation- 50% aggregate
MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMA/GMAT
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based
Class 12 with at least 50%-55% aggregate
Merit-based
Class 12 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics along with Chemistry/ Computer Science with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based
Graduation or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based
Class 12 or equivalent with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry/ Statistics/ Geology/ Computer Science with at least 50% aggregate
Merit-based
Note:The relaxation in qualification and reservation is as per UGC and State Govt. norms.
To check out the admission process for other UG & PG courses,make your course selection here
Students can check the detailedBabuBanarasi Das University course admissions process:
1: BBDU Application Process

BBD University application process is conducted both online and offline modes. Candidates must fill in all necessary details and submit the form to confirm candidature. Students can check the detailedBBD University feestructure here.
2: Merit List Publication

Following the application period, the university releases a merit list indicating the minimum required scores for eligibility in various courses. Aspirants meeting or exceeding the cutoff marks proceed to the subsequent selection phase.
3: Counselling Session

After appearing for the respective entrance exams, candidates must appear for counselling round. After the counselling round, candidates will receive the confirmed seat after completing few more steps.
4: Admission Confirmation
For final admission, shortlisted candidates must pay the fees and confirm the seat. This step finalises the enrollment process at BBDU.

description: BBDU cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

BBDU NEET UG cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BDS course for various categories under the Home State quota. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks till 4 rounds.

For the General HS category, the BDS cutoff in the last round was 77788. This means that this is the maximum rank at which admissions are allowed. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff for the first and last rounds for the General HS quota.

As per the BBDU BDS cutoff 2025, the last round rank was 77788. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff was 304455 and 1078764, respectively, for the General HS quota candidates. After analysing these ranks, we can conclude that the competition for this category for the BDS course has been fluctuating over the years.
To know the cutoff for other courses, categories, rounds, etc., use the filters in the table below.
Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the previous year's cutoff trends for the General All India category students:

BBDU accepts UPTAC cutoff ranks for admission to the BE/BTech course. Admission for the year 2025-26 is over. To know when the applications, exams, etc., for the next academic session start, check the table below.
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's UPTAC Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

The BBDU BDS cutoff 2025 can be seen in the table below, along with the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023. Students needed to attain a rank of 77788 or lower to be able to gain admission at this university. This is the requirement for the students under the General HS quota. To know the maximum and minimum cutoff ranks for other rounds, categories and years, students can view the table below.

In this section, students can access the BBDU MDS cutoff 2025, 2024, as well as 2023. As per the first round, the most competitive course was MDS in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, with a cutoff of 4356. On the other hand, the most popular course in the last round was MDS in Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, with the cutoff being 6103.
