reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure are excellent and on average for a college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. Labs are nice and the best library is good. Classrooms are nice. Canteens are excellent like Nesscafé, Burger Singh and Dominoz franchise. Bbd college in large stadium for cricket and other activities basketball and tennis courts in the college

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good. The campus is good. The food is not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good with Wi-Fi and labs. Classrooms are like schools with no AC, but it's not a big deal, so I can consider them good. The library is decent and not fancy. There are lifts in the university building, but they are very slow. The campus is clean and feels good. Hostel food is bad. Facilities are good, like a gym, basketball court, and tennis court. There is also a stadium, which is big. I would rate 9 out of 10 for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in  Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Good  college in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: Labs are awesome. Food and rooms in hostels are much more decent. Games are there. Tennis court, badminton, volleyball, and mainly a cricket stadium are available. Rather than games, the medical facilities are also very good. Library of the college is good, and the stock of books is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Every year, the college gives good placements and high packages.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs. Classes are well-equipped with modern design and devices, such as smart boards, and well-maintained furniture like tables and chairs. Generally, the food is good, and on any special occasion, they bring better food with deluxe parties. The sports facilities are well maintained with good opportunities, welcoming the students to show their talent.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, average placements, and a large green campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is very good. Labs, classrooms and library are well maintained and properly equipped. As a first year student, our classes are on the 5th floor of 8 floor as well 2 ground floors building, and getting a lift at 9 a. m. is difficult, so we often use the stairs, which actually helps in staying fit. Hostels are in good condition, though not perfect. Mess food is sometimes good and sometimes average, while the canteen food is quite good. Medical facilities are av...

reviews.review_heading: The college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works well, labs are fantastic, and classrooms are spacious and well-equipped. The library is big. Hostels are not very suitable for living. Mess food is so bad that people sometimes get sick. Facilities at BBD (Babu Banarasi Das) institutions in Lucknow generally receive mixed reviews, with hostels often rated average to poor (especially food quality), while medical and sports facilities are usually available. Wi-Fi, libraries, and labs are generally well-regarded.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent in terms of placement, and the quality of study is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good because the buildings are well-maintained, and a beautiful infrastructure is provided by the college. The internal structure of my building is very good. Classrooms are well-maintained, and a digital board is present in all classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: College is good only for rich people, and if anyone comes from middle class, then this is not good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Everything is very much okay. But the hostel facilities are not good. The food in the mess is very poor quality. The hostel fees are also very high, they charge 80,000 per annum for three B. Ed rooms, and they don’t provide facilities like high-end amenities. They give only one almirah and one B. Ed with table and chair, and the rooms are very small, so it’s not good.

reviews.review_heading: Small talks about college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, not that bad. It's in working condition and maintained. It's okay working, but they upgraded their infrastructure last year, but it's not that good. They were updated from the last one we had before, so it’s okay, but not that okay. You can work with it.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college to take admission in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Banarasi Das University is not that great. It has average infrastructure. It has a large library, and they also provide Wi-Fi to all the departments. The quality of the hostel is average, and the food was okay. This college also provided a mess.

reviews.review_heading: BBDU Lucknow offers great faculty, placements, and a lively campus for learning and growth.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my course are very good. We get many seminars, we have labs and a classroom with video representation, a proper quiz, and fully AC, centralized AC, and many books related to our course. Our hostel is also good with full safety and security, and we have a proper medical area where students get proper treatment, and the quality of food is also good. There are many options on the menu that they cook regularly, and we also have a proper play area in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. The course completion, the sports game facilities, medical facilities, and mess and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low fees.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library is well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor, making it not worth staying there. However, during the course, the sports, game facilities, medical facilities, mess, and canteen facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for low-budget studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The library is well and good. The quality of facilities in the hostel is also average, but the food quality is very poor and not worth staying there during the course completion. The sports, game facilities, medical facilities, and mess and canteen facilities are also good.

paragraphs: The total course fee for BBA ranges between INR 2.40 Lacs and INR 4.2 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to BBDU BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must pass Class 12 with 50%-55% aggregate to apply for BBA course. The fee for BBA varies as per the specialisation. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode. The application fee is INR 500 for each course.

The total tuition fee for various course at Babu Banarasi Das University is different as per courses. Students can check the table below to know the total tuition fee for various courses at BBDU Lucknow:

Babu Banarasi Das University Lucknow provides several merit and need-based scholarships to students. Some of the scholarships offered at the university include Research Fellowship, Scholarship for SC/ST Category Students, Scholarship for OBC and Minority categories, etc.  The Research Fellowship is offered to PhD students in the form of financial assistance. The university also offers financial assistance to the students coming from the economically weaker sections of the society. The SC/ ST/ OBC scholarships are offered to students belonging to the respective minority community.

faqs.answer: A:    No specific entrance exam score is mentioned by Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT) for admission to the MBA program. The candidates' academic standing is taken into consideration when choosing them for the MBA program. However, candidates must take the university-based entrance exam in order to be considered for admission to OUAT's undergraduate and graduate programs. In order to be admitted to the M.Tech program, applicants need to have a current GATE score. Candidates must show up for a common entrance exam administered by the university in order to be admitted to the Ph.D. program.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does OUAT accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    OUAT entrance exam is the entrance exam for Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology. This exam is mainly to get admission in different UG courses, PG courses and doctoral programmes. This exam is mainly focused on physics, chemistry, mathematics/biology and mental aptitude. and they you an option to choose one section from maths and biology. The syllabus is mainly based on NCERT class 11 and 12 and aptitude questions are asked for resoning, verbal reasoning, and quantitative reasoning. you can get more detail information by visiting OUAT official website.

reviews_list.review_title: College of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - A Path Towards Your Dreams and Success.

review_content.Placements: This course, which I am pursuing, is Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (BVSc AH). Last year, 90% of the passing-out students from our college are doing service as Veterinary Assistant Surgeons in Odisha, and some opted for PG and higher studies in this college. The average salary offered here is 70,000. In internships, students are also paid.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There are different buildings for different departments. All buildings are new and equipped with all facilities. There are smart classrooms with nice accommodation. Availability of Wi-Fi, advanced laboratories with recent new technologies, and a library with books on all subjects. There are also hostels for boys and girls. The food quality is of top level, with a restaurant-like taste. Free medical facilities for all. Different sports like cricket, volleyball, football, and badminton are available. Scope for NCC, NSS, and PE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied as my expectations were high, but the college is not as I expected it to be.

review_content.Placements: In Bhubaneswar, some students got placed, but in Chiplima Agriculture College, no one was placed because students don't want to work in private companies with a wage of 15,000 to 20,000. In our college, students are focusing on UPSC and banking-related examinations, and many students also get jobs every year. Many students are placed under OPSC as Assistant Agriculture Officers.
review_content.Infrastructure: In hostels, Wi-Fi is installed and in the college as well. Air conditioning is present in the classrooms, and smart boards are available for writing purposes. The hostel rooms are well-furnished with marble flooring and cupboards with a lock system provided. Each student is given a chair, study table, and bed by the college. In some rooms, one fan is provided, and in others, two fans are provided. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

faqs.answer: The precise number of seats available in Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology MBA programme varies depending on the specialisation you have selected.A total of 70 MBA seats are available for all specialties.Agri-business management is a popular specialisation that usually has the most seats about 32.There are typically 15-20 seats available for each of the other areas (marketing, finance, and HR).Check the OUAT official website or get in touch with their Admissions Office directly for the most up-to-date information on the availability of seats in your selected specialisation course that you are interested in.

faqs.answer: No specific entrance exam score is mentioned by Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT) for admission to the MBA program. The candidates' academic standing is taken into consideration when choosing them for the MBA program. However, candidates must take the university-based entrance exam in order to be considered for admission to OUAT's undergraduate and graduate programs. In order to be admitted to the M.Tech program, applicants need to have a current GATE score. Candidates must show up for a common entrance exam administered by the university in order to be admitted to the Ph.D. program.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Botany - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college, excellent teachers, and every year there is an annual function and sports meet.

content.Placements: If you do a master's degree, you could get a job in the teaching sector after graduation you can give government exams to get a good job, or you can do a master's degree and then a Ph.D. for lectureship, or you can apply to ICAR, ICMR, and other government institutes for internships.
content.Infrastructure: OUAT does have its hostel. The food is good, we have air-conditioned classrooms, and the labs have all of the instruments required. The food quality of the mess is good. We have our sports complex open from 5 AM to 11 AM, and it is again open in the evening. Lab facilities are also good

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Odisha University of Agriculture and Technology, Bhubaneswar.

content.Placements: Most of the students apply for civil services in Odisha. Many students getting selected for civil services from our college. Many banks like IDBI bank, Mother Dairy, Pradan, Srijan, Indian Potash Limited, Wassan, and MK Agrico visit our college. Top roles offered are AAO and ASCO.
content.Infrastructure: The college has Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned with digital boards. The library is big and clean. Hostels are neat and clean with tasty foods two times a day, lunch and dinner. The hostel doesn't have air-conditioner rooms. They clean and maintain the hostel on time.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSC) and Animal Husbandry (AH) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - A Path Towards Your Dreams and Success.

content.Placements: This course, which I am pursuing, is Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (BVSc AH). Last year, 90% of the passing-out students from our college are doing service as Veterinary Assistant Surgeons in Odisha, and some opted for PG and higher studies in this college. The average salary offered here is 70,000. In internships, students are also paid.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There are different buildings for different departments. All buildings are new and equipped with all facilities. There are smart classrooms with nice accommodation. Availability of Wi-Fi, advanced laboratories with recent new technologies, and a library with books on all subjects. There are also hostels for boys and girls. The food quality is of top level, with a restaurant-like taste. Free medical facilities for all. Different sports like cricket, volleyball, football, and badminton are available. Scope for NCC, NSS, and PE.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied as my expectations were high, but the college is not as I expected it to be.

content.Placements: In Bhubaneswar, some students got placed, but in Chiplima Agriculture College, no one was placed because students don't want to work in private companies with a wage of 15,000 to 20,000. In our college, students are focusing on UPSC and banking-related examinations, and many students also get jobs every year. Many students are placed under OPSC as Assistant Agriculture Officers.
content.Infrastructure: In hostels, Wi-Fi is installed and in the college as well. Air conditioning is present in the classrooms, and smart boards are available for writing purposes. The hostel rooms are well-furnished with marble flooring and cupboards with a lock system provided. Each student is given a chair, study table, and bed by the college. In some rooms, one fan is provided, and in others, two fans are provided. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Microbiology  - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is very good in terms of quality of education.

content.Placements: College is good at providing internships. You will also get a scholarship here, no doubt. BSC and MSc degrees are both available here. Student union formation also takes place here so if a student is interested in a leadership program, he/she can start their career here also.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel takes little extra charge than other government colleges, but the quality of food is best here as they provide 3 to 4 days of non-vegetarian meals. And the hostel fees are also good and rooms are being cleaned here . New hostels are continuing to shift students from old to new.

admission_overview.college_name: OUAT Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology admissionis primarily entrance-based. The university offers an extensive range of courses in the fields of Agriculture, Science, Arts, Management, Technology, and more at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the accepted national and state-level tests, such as ICAR AIEEA and Orissa SAMS. Students can apply at the admission portal of the university.Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology, also known asOUAT, offers more than ten courses across multiple specialisations. Interested students can read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for the university.

Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology course admissionis subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. OUAT offers UG programmes such as BSc, BVSc, BTech and BFSc. Admission to all the UG programmes is based on the entrance test conducted by the University. For undergraduate course admissions, students need to complete Class 12 in a relevant field, whereas graduation is needed to enrol into the PG courses. Students must also appear for the accepted exams as selection is entirely entrance-based. Interested students can check out the following table to learn about the general eligibility & selection criteria forOUAT courses:

To get admission into Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT), one must complete a multi-step process which starts with appearing for an entrance exam. The application process for the university mainly commences online.Students seeking to join the university are advised to go through the course details including the eamdission process before applying for the same. Candidates can follow the steps explained below to completeOUAT admission process:
Step 1: Entrance Examination

Interested students need to appear for the course-specific entrance test. The university accepts several national and state-level exams, such as ICAR AIEEA, OJEE, etc. Alternatively, students may also appear for the univeristy-level entrance test.
Step 2: Application

Once exam results are out, students may apply for the course of choice online. The process can be completed by registering oneself and providing the basic details. Students need to provide educational qualifications and other relevant information while submitting the form.
Step 3: Selection Rounds

Students are then selected based on several parameters, such as their academic performance, entrance exam scores, etc. A general idea forOUAT selection criteriacan be obtained from the table above for the popular courses:
Step 4: Seat Confirmation
Selected students need to go through document verification and pay OUAT admission fees to secure their spots at the university.

faqs.answer: OJEE score is so important for admission perspective if you are to take an admission in MBA at Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology goes to30 percentile for general category.But ,The most important thing to note the actual score may be depends on no. of seats available and how many candidates are appearing for exam. If we take a looklast year'sOJEE score forMBAat Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology was32 percentile for General Category in 2022.

faqs.question: When is Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology application forms out?
faqs.answer: OUAT 2025 Application Form B is now available for undergraduate admission to OUAT,  as well as for Agro-polytechnic students who have passed out in 2025-26. The OUAT 2025 Form B is out on the official website for undergraduate admission to OUAT 2025. Along with all the selected UG candidates, the form is also available for Agro-Polytechnic students who have graduated during the 2025-26 academic session and are pursuing admission through Agro-Polytechnic UG Admission.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for the MBA programme at Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology?
faqs.answer: The precise number of seats available in Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology MBA programme varies depending on the specialisation you have selected.A total of 70 MBA seats are available for all specialties.Agri-business management is a popular specialisation that usually has the most seats about 32.There are typically 15-20 seats available for each of the other areas (marketing, finance, and HR).Check the OUAT official website or get in touch with their Admissions Office directly for the most up-to-date information on the availability of seats in your selected specialisation course that you are interested in.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does OUAT accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: No specific entrance exam score is mentioned by Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT) for admission to the MBA program. The candidates' academic standing is taken into consideration when choosing them for the MBA program. However, candidates must take the university-based entrance exam in order to be considered for admission to OUAT's undergraduate and graduate programs. In order to be admitted to the M.Tech program, applicants need to have a current GATE score. Candidates must show up for a common entrance exam administered by the university in order to be admitted to the Ph.D. program.

faqs.answer: The Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT) charges the following fees for its different courses: Undergraduate course costs range from INR 17,860 to INR 35,071 in tuition, while annual room and board costs range from INR 10,000 to INR 15,000. The first year of the B.Sc. {Hons.} course costs INR 17,860. For the first year, the M.Tech and M.V.Sc. courses cost about INR 35,569. OUAT charges total fees for a range of courses from Rs 9.69K to Rs 2.22 Lakhs.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is OUAT. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #19 rank in the Agriculture and Allied Sectors category. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around OUAT rankings.

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Orissa In 2025
Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Orissa In 2025

nirf.description:
OUAT has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for OUAT indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, OUAT's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, OUAT's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, OUAT's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, OUAT fell 4 ranks to #19 rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

library.description:
Central Library, being part and parcel to the education and research system, is playing a vital role in the Orissa University of Agriculture and Technology (OUAT). It provides information support and functions as a nerve center for academic and research activities around which the progress of university is realized. The Central Library serves a wide range of users’ viz. undergraduate students, postgraduate students, research scholars, scientists, teachers, administrators and other staff/employees of the university present in headquarters and other outlying colleges and research stations.
Central Library having 97589 no of Books with subscription of 45 Foreign & 110 Indian Journals and 7204 Bound volumes of journals. Central Library also having 3951 thesis of  Sc. & Ph. D.and General Reference, Reports, Proceedings, Abstracts, Reviews, Bibliographies etc. including in-house publications.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, excellent teachers, and every year there is an annual function and sports meet.
reviews.review_text: OUAT does have its hostel. The food is good, we have air-conditioned classrooms, and the labs have all of the instruments required. The food quality of the mess is good. We have our sports complex open from 5 AM to 11 AM, and it is again open in the evening. Lab facilities are also good

reviews.review_heading: Review of Odisha University of Agriculture and Technology, Bhubaneswar.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned with digital boards. The library is big and clean. Hostels are neat and clean with tasty foods two times a day, lunch and dinner. The hostel doesn't have air-conditioner rooms. They clean and maintain the hostel on time.

reviews.review_heading: College of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - A Path Towards Your Dreams and Success.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There are different buildings for different departments. All buildings are new and equipped with all facilities. There are smart classrooms with nice accommodation. Availability of Wi-Fi, advanced laboratories with recent new technologies, and a library with books on all subjects. There are also hostels for boys and girls. The food quality is of top level, with a restaurant-like taste. Free medical facilities for all. Different sports like cricket, volleyball, fo...

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied as my expectations were high, but the college is not as I expected it to be.
reviews.review_text: In hostels, Wi-Fi is installed and in the college as well. Air conditioning is present in the classrooms, and smart boards are available for writing purposes. The hostel rooms are well-furnished with marble flooring and cupboards with a lock system provided. Each student is given a chair, study table, and bed by the college. In some rooms, one fan is provided, and in others, two fans are provided. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good in terms of quality of education.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel takes little extra charge than other government colleges, but the quality of food is best here as they provide 3 to 4 days of non-vegetarian meals. And the hostel fees are also good and rooms are being cleaned here . New hostels are continuing to shift students from old to new.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with the good teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides good hostel facilities with separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostel contains 24-hour hot water, and the food provided is good. We have a beautiful mess that can accommodate around 500 students. The infrastructure is good, and our department has separate blocks. The labs are well-equipped, and a library is also available, along with Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied with the faculty but not so much with the infrastructure. But it is getting better.
reviews.review_text:
The college has the availability of all basic facilities of classrooms, labs, a good library, and multiple other constructions for better facilities are going on. 
The hostel facility is good, with proper medical facilities available and proper space and competition for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus always encourages good studies.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they provide Wi-Fi and the latest technology installed in labs. Classrooms are digitalized and have AC-fitted rooms. In our hostels are developing now with new infrastructure. It will look like an old one, but the college is fully equipped with the latest technology, installed rooms, and mechanisms.

reviews.review_heading: College is best to explore.
reviews.review_text: The hostel offers excellent infrastructure, including well-maintained boarding facilities, high-quality food, and a reliable water supply. The boys' hostel provides free Wi-Fi, while some girls' hostels also offer this amenity. The college boasts well-equipped labs, a spacious central library, air-conditioned classrooms, and smart boards for interactive learning. Additionally, OUAT students and staff have access to a well-equipped hospital on campus. The college also provides various recreationa...

reviews.review_heading: Good for student life but no assurance of job.
reviews.review_text: The college and hostel infrastructure is good. The hostel and college are equipped with Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped. Classrooms are equipped with smartboards and projectors. All the classes are in AC. All the students were accommodated in the hostel. Both boys and girls hostels are available. The food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for education.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned. Our campus has good environment. Laboratory is well-equipped. Mess is available. Canteen is very good. There is a dispensary on campus. Sports and games are conducted in this college. Wi-Fi is available in our college and hostel. There is a decent library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. New buildings are being constructed for academic extension purposes. PG buildings are very good. There is no cafe in our college. Hostels are old. New hostels are good with study tables, chairs, dormitory, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because of its teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is spacious. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. The library is a gem. Labs are average. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college and hostel. The hostel is comfortable and hygienic. The food served in the mess is above average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus and teachers, but there is a lack of recruitment from good company.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available in our college. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Our labs are well maintained. Our classrooms are using digital modes of study. The central library has a large collection of books that students need. The hostel has good food service. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Depends upon a student career choice if he ar she wants to join the programme.
reviews.review_text: We have good electricity facility with good water supply. Wi-Fi facili is also there. Labs and classrooms are NEET and clean. Sometimes we suffer during summers due to maximum power cut. Mess food qyality is quite average, not so good and mostly depend on outside food. Medical facilities are available.

data.description: The mess food at Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology is different in every hostel but all in all food in Orissa University of Agriculture & Technology is much better than most of the institutions. The food quality is really good and they also follow a calendar.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Odisha University of Agriculture and Technology, Bhubaneswar

likes.text: The college has a great reputation for helping the students in getting public sector jobs.
The top companies include ITC, Britannia, Universal limited, Nestle, and Cadbury visit to hire students.

A health center, gymnasium, and sports like cricket, football, and basketball grounds are available.

likes.text: We have the best teachers who were qualified from various well-reputed institutes like IVRI, Tanuvas NDRI.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. According to the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Annamalai University, Chidambaram, ranks within the rank band of #101-150 under the category 'University'.

Annamalai University admissions 2026-26 are open for Certificate, Diploma, UG and PG courses. Interested candidates can visit the official university's website to apply for their desired course. A few additional updates are given below:

table.details: A+ Grade by NAAC, NBA, ICAR

college_info.intro:
Annamalai University Cuddalore popular programmes are MBA and BTech/ B.E. BTech students can look for career opportunities such as Web Designer, Software Developer, Testing Engineer, System Engineer, and others. B.E./BTech is offered in 12 specialiations. The B.E. in Chemical Engineering department aims to provide research-based education to students. The labs are adequately equipped with modern pieces of equipment.
Annamalai University Chidambaram's MBA faculty has received various awards in recognition of their contributions to the knowledge. The MBA department has produced around 290 PhDs and 190 MPhils. 1,131 research papers have been published in international and national journals. In addition to this, the department has signed MoUs with four Indian and various foreign institutes and organisations. Overall, Annamalai University in Chennai is ranked among the best universities for its flagship programmes. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Annamalai University Chidambaram and their respective eligibility and Annamalai University Annamalai Nagar fee structure:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Candidates willing to get admission to the different courses must take part in the Annamalai University Chidambaram admission process and apply online on the official website of Annamalai University. At the UG level, Annamalai University Chidambaram offers BTech, BA, BSc, and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university has MBA, MCA, etc. programmes to students. The university also provides certification, PhD, and several other courses to students.

faqs.answer: A:    Annamalai University BTech fees range between INR 1.5 Lacs - INR 7 lakh. The fee mentioned here is the total tuition fee with some other components and is taken from an unofficial source, hence is indicative. For the detailed fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the University. content.Placements: Each student gets 2-4 offers from various companies, and the placement is 100 percent. There are many companies that take students from our college, and last time the company Capgemini took over more than 700 students from VSB Engineering College located in Karur.

admission_overview.description: Annamalai University Admission 2026 will open soon. Annamalai University offers UG, PG, PG diploma, diploma, certificate, and PhD programmes covering the domains of Science, Engineering, Healthcare, Management etc . It also provides courses through distance learning, which are approved by the Distance Education Council (DEC). In addition to the regular programmes, value-added courses in all the departments of Annamalai University are conducted every day after the class timings. In addition, Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) conducted through the SWAYAM portal of the UGC are also offered at Annamalai University free of cost. Admissions are mostly merit based with admission to some select courses being entrance based. The instituet accepts MAH CET, TANCET, NEET PG, NEET UG etc for entrance based admissions. Read the article to know more about Annamalai University Admission 2026.

paragraphs: Annamalai University admission 2026 includes the submission of an application form, appearance for the entrance test, the release of the merit list, the counselling process and fee payment. students can follow the -wise Annamalai University admission process as given below:
1: Annamalai University Application Process 2026

The university accepts applications via online mode. Eligible students can visit the university's official website (www.annamalaiuniversity.ac.in) to apply. Further, the aspirants shall ensure that they apply within the due date.
2: Appear for the Entrance Test

If a student fills out the initial application process, they now have to appear for the course-specific entrance test. For undergraduate engineering, i.e., BTech course, students should turn out for the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA).
3: Release of the Merit List
Based on the entrance test scores, the University will release the merit list of eligible students for the next round of the admission process.
4: Counselling & Fee Payment

In this , students whose names appeared in the merit list released by the University are then required to appear for the counselling process. After the counselling round, Annamalai University released a final list of selected students for final admission. Selected students are then required to pay theAnnamalai University admission feeto confirm their admission.

Annamalai University fee is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. Course Name

courses_data.name: Annamalai University MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: Annamalai University offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. The course is offered in both full-time and distance learning modes. MBA admission at Annamalai University is based on a valid TANCET score, followed by a counselling process. The Faculty of Arts at Annamalai conducts a two-year MBA course divided into four semesters. Also, the university offers an MBA Programme in dual-specialisation mode, allowing candidates to choose two specialisations of their preference.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 50% in graduation. Can I get admission for MBA in Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: With less than 50% in graduation it is difficult to get admission in Annamalai University for MBA course. The minimum marks required for the same is 50%. You can contact the admission office for more details.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA in Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: The university does not conduct any in-house entrance test for MBA in Annamalai University. However, the aspirants are selected based on merit in TANCET followed by a counselling round. Candidates seeking admission need to take the entrance test and apply by completing the TANCET application process. There is no other provision for admission to an MBA. Hence, aspirants must take the exam and secure a valid score.

faqs.question: Can I do MBA in Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the Annamalai University MBA course admission need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria. The applications are accepted by only the candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria. To be eligible for MBA admission, students must have passed a graduation degree (10+2+3 pattern) in any stream with a minimum of 50% aggregate (SC/ST candidates need to qualify for the graduation degree with pass marks only). Further, candidates must also hold the relevant documents

faqs.question: How can students join Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: The UG degree admission process entails the basic eligibility criteria of maintaining a minimum aggregate of 40% to 50% in Class 12. For PG level programmes, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation and secure a valid score in suggested entrance exams, depending on the course opted for. The University considers valid scores of entrance exams such as NEET UG/ PG, CEETA, TANCET, TNEA and others.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in graduation. Can I get admission for M.Tech at Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: Most of the universities and institutes accept candidates for its M.Tech programme based on fulfilment of a specified set of eligibility criteria. Similarily, forAnnamalai University M.Tech admissions, the minimum marks required in graduation is 50%. Hence, a candidate scoring less than 60% is eligible to apply for admission at the institute if they have scored more than 50%. faqs.question: How many courses are offered at Annamalai University?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University offers nearly 445 courses at UG, PG, doctoral, Diploma and certificate levels. These courses are offered across the streams of Engineering, Science, Arts, Commerce, Management, Fine Arts, Architecture & Planning, Aviation, etc. The courses are full-time, part-time, distance, and online. Moreover, the university and its affiliated colleges offer the courses. Some of the Annamalai University-affiliated colleges are AIHM Institute of Tourism and Hotel Management, Aleesha Institute of Fashion Designing, Allied College of Hospitality, Culinary Arts and Management, Annamalai University DDE, Aquariuss Animations Pvt Ltd, etc.Click Herefor eligibility, fee, and selection details about offered courses.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for MBA at Annamalai University DDE?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission in MBA programme at Annamalai University DDE have to pay an application fee. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. The application fee for MBA is INR 295 including GST. Candidates are advised to keep the fee receipt with them for any future reference.

paragraphs: Annamalai University placement report 2025 is not released. According to the latest data released, a total of 94 companies visited the campus and 1791 students were placed during Annamalai University placements 2024 .

A total of 59 companies visited the campus and 440 students were placed from the Engineering department during the placement drive 2024. 8 companies visited and 380 students were placed from the Agriculture department in 2024.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during Annamalai University placements?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University highest package data is not released. However, as per NIRF report 2025, BTech and MTech median package recorded in 2024 was 2.5 LPA and 4.26 LPA. MBA median package in 2024 was 2.45 LPA.

faqs.question: Does Annamalai University offer placements?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University offers good placements to its students. 94 companies visited the campus and 1791 students were placed in 2024. During the placement drive 2023, 106 companies visited and 1558 students were placed.

faqs.question: How many companies visit the campus during Annamalai University placements?
faqs.answer: A total of 94 companies visited the campus during Annamalai University placements 2024. In 2023, 106 companies visited the campus.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Annamalai University (Distance Education), Tamil Nadu?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University are providing distance learning but still there ares ome placement opportunities for students.The department placement cell and the university placement cell conduct training programmes regularly for the students to acquire the requisite skills. The experts from diverse fields are invited to develop the soft skills, to build up their self confidence and to enrich the technical skills of the students.The salaries for Masters like MBA are not too high but you can get your initial experience over there then you can look for other opportunities.

faqs.question: What is the Annamalai University placement truth? Does it really give a 100% placement record?
faqs.answer: Annamalai University offers placement assistance through various collaborations and partnerships laid by the University. As per the recent stats, around 202 PG 2 year Agriculture students participated in placement drive, within which, 125 received packaged successfully, marking the median package of worth INR 4.22 LPA. Similarly, among 1,180 UG 4-year Agriculture students, 811 received placement packages, marking the median package of INR 3.19 LPA. M.Tech graduates, on the other hand, received a median package of INR 4.28 LPA.

Thus, the total tuition fee for the ME programme ranges from INR 50,000 to INR 1.1 lakh . Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

description: Annamalai University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Annamalai University Chidambaram NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19490 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Annamalai University Chidambaram MBBS cutoff 2025 was 19490 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 20243 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Annamalai University Chidambaram accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

The previous year Annamalai University NEET PG cut off 2022 has been concluded with the release of Round 5 Seat Allotment results. Based cutoff 2022 for NEET PGcutoff , MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy can be considered as the most competitive branch. The R1 and the last round closing rank for MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy was 1038 for the General category All India students. On analysing cutoff 2022 with that of 2021, there has been an increasing trend in cutoff for the M
Candidates can refer to the table given below to download the consolidated previous year's NEET PG Counselling Rounds for the General All India category students:

Annamalai University Chidambaram MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 3212 among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI quota, the cutoff rank for the same course was 5503.

Students can view the Annamalai University Chidambaram BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Annamalai University Chidambaram was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 39965.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Annamalai University Chidambaram. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #42 rank in the Pharmacy category, #34 under State Public University, and #38 under Agriculture and Allied Sectors. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Annamalai University Chidambaram rankings.

rankings.highlight: 36th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Annamalai University Chidambaram outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Annamalai University Chidambaram's rankings in 'University' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Engineering' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 50 ranks to #201 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The 'Pharmacy' category rankings of the institute have shown a decreasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 15 ranks to #42 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is noticeable that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 3 ranks to #34 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Annamalai University Chidambaram has received strong ranks by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Medical (Government)' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook-ICARE 2025.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, Annamalai University Chidambaram has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2026, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 50 ranks to #571 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Annamalai University Chidambaram fell 8 ranks to #156 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

sports.description: Annamalai University offers sports facilities to promote the holistic development of students. The institute offers a wide variety of sports including:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 3 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Place for placement VSB Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure in hostels. They provide routers for students to use free Wi-Fi. In the hostel, they provide a bed with bedsheets for each student and cupboards with blocks, and the routine is different from other colleges. There are strict rules for the hostel that everyone should follow.

reviews.review_heading: Annamalai University review.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure in college, old but in good condition. Nice architecture and a good environment for study. Hostel quality is poor, not so hygienic and clean. If you want to join the hostel, think twice before joining. Most of the students get skin problems because of the bad water and unhygienic environment in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent academy support with a good campus, but needs more practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study material. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average, while the canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage student recreation. Overall, the infrastructure...

reviews.review_heading: Annamalai University for Ph.D. and M.Ed course admission.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, but there are limited facilities available because it does not provide many courses, so there are fewer facilities. In this college, hostel facilities are available, but an extra charge is taken to use the facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 10 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Well qualified faculty members and encouraging.
reviews.review_text: Our college has provided facilities and infrastructure. Everyone can use the internet. It has a huge central library. Classrooms are good, clean, and hygienic. The labs are good. Hostel facilities for both girls and boys are good, and the food served is good. The canteen is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 5 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: VSB Engineering College has good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: VSB Engineering College's infrastructure and facilities are excellent. This college has more departments. All classrooms are more comfortable for all students. Multiple computer laboratories are available in this college. This college provides good hostel facilities. The hostel food quality is very good. Multiple sports grounds are also there in this college. Emergency medical facilities are available here. There is a well-stocked library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: This college has very good infrastructure and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: This college has very well-equipped workshops, a library, and labs, but the hostel is not recommended because of the hostel's food and room facilities. The campus is liberal for studies and extracurricular activities. There is a well-organized central library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 1 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has a peaceful and friendly environment with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good hostel with faculty members on each floor and separate janitors on each floor, which makes it clean. They are very good without any disappointments. They make sure to meet every aspect of students and make sure students are comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Rollercoaster course and life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Department of Pharmacy is good, with all labs for the subjects that are taught there. When it comes to the hostel, the fee is only 50,000 for a year. Food at the mess is okay, and the university has its own hospital and a big pavilion for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 9 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A place for placement, good infrastructure, green campus.
reviews.review_text: Yes, the Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are very neat and spacious. Hostel facilities are also good, and the mess has tasty food and good water facilities. The canteen is also neat and has good food facilities. Sports and games are also happening nicely, with many competitions taking place at both state and national levels.

reviews.review_heading: M.Sc. Statistics at Annamalai University.
reviews.review_text: Non-vegetarian food is served three times a week. The college provides good medical facilities and regular health checkups for students and faculty members. This initiative demonstrates the college management's concern for students' physical health.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 10 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Teachers are friendly and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. The labs are well-equipped with air conditioning. The classrooms look very beautiful with AC. The library is good, and many books are available. We have a tennis court at our college. The college provides good hostel facilities. The canteen food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 9 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: VSB Engineering College is the place for placement.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms have smart boards with 75-inch displays. In my college surroundings, both the hostel and classrooms have high-speed internet Wi-Fi. Different dishes are available in the canteen every day. The hostel food has different varieties based on the days, with non-veg provided twice a week.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by VSB Engineering CollegeReviewed on 30 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: In our department, every classroom is neat and has a smart mirror and high-speed Wi-Fi. The department helps to learn without any distractions. Our college consists of a library where there are more than 70,000 books. It has high-speed Wi-Fi. Its speed is 10 Kbs.

reviews.review_heading: Good university with a strong reputation. One can gain knowledge and secure placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in both hostel and college are excellent. Infrastructure is very neat, and free Wi-Fi is provided to all. Projectors are available in every classroom. There are two main libraries in our college. Food in the mess is tasty. Medical support is available 24 hours. Recreational activities are also available.

data.description: Annamalai University Annamalai Nagar faculty is good and experienced. Annamalai University Chidambaram also arranges seminars, guest lectures and workshops, and various trainings for students. Annamalai University Chidambaram faculty go through multiple trainings before actually teaching the students.

As per the NIRF 2025 rankings, DU ranks #15 under the category 'Overall', and #5 under the category 'Universities'.

DU admissions 2026 are open. A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - Ranked 328 by the QS World University Rankings 2026 - Ranked 5th under the 'University' category by the NIRF Ranking 2025

college_info.intro:
Some of the popular programmes of Delhi University include BSc, BCom Hons and MSc, etc. Apart from this, BA (Hons) Economics and DU BA (Hons) English are another popular courses offered at DU. Interested students have to appear for the CUET exam and DU CSAS process.
DU graduates are placed in top organisations such as Genpact, Accenture, EY, Deloitte, HCL Tech, InfoEdge, etc.
Delhi University offers various UG, PG and doctorate programmes in streams such as Arts, Science, Commerce, Management, Law, Medical, Design, Information Technology, etc. Students can check the DU popular programmes, along with the eligibility and fee in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.question: What is the average package offered by top DU colleges?

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered at Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi is approximately INR 80 LPA (80 Lacs per annum). The average package is not less than INR 85,000 per month in Delhi and can go up to INR 1 Lacs or INR 2 Lakhs per month after an undergraduate degree. Further, the placement rate recorded during Maulana Azad Medical College PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements in 2022 was 100 percent.
faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi?

faqs.answer: A:    The latest DU BSc placements statistics are not available as of now. As per the NIRF report 2024, out of 266 UG three-year students, 190 were placed. The median package offered was INR 5.5 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of the university in the recent past have been Dell, Google, Gartner, Amazon, Barclays, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: DU University offers over 500 programmes approved by various academic and executive councils, of which 200+ programmes have been considered for NAAC accreditation. DU Delhi admission 2026 is different for entrance-based and merit-based UG and PG programmes. DU admission to all the PG courses is subject to CUET PG exam conducted by NTA.

faqs.answer: A:    There is no minimum aggregate requirements to get into a BSc course of Delhi University. The students seeking admission must be Class 12 or equivalent examination pass to get admission. Eligible candidates can further go to the CUET website to register and apply as just meeting the eligibility requirement is not enough.
faqs.question: What is the minimum percentage required in Class 12 to be eligible for BSc in DU?

faqs.answer: A:    To get admission to BA (Hons) Psychology course at Shaheed Rajguru College, students need to clear CUET 2024 exam. Admissions are based on the CUET score. However, the deadline is over to apply for BA (Hons) Psychology course at Shaheed Rajguru College. There is no other way to apply for BA (Hons) course other than CUET exam score.
faqs.question: How can I get admission for B.A (Hons) Psychology at Shaheed Rajguru College after deadline for application has passed?

faqs.answer: A:    Delhi University BCom/ BCom (H) fee structure is cumulative of various components, such as tuition fees, caution money, etc. The total tuition fees for the UG course range from INR 540 to INR 1 lakh. This fee range is inclusive of course fees at the DU-affiliated colleges. Once final selection is done, candidates need to pay the admission fee amount. It must be noted that the fee range given here is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How much does BCom at University of Delhi cost?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Economics and Food Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty members are good, but the infrastructure isn’t.

review_content.Placements: I am not much aware of my college’s placement cell, but there is a cell that provides better placements. About 65–70 percent of students have been placed, from my knowledge. Students mostly find internships online through sites and LinkedIn and apply for jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. The Wi-Fi sometimes doesn’t work, and the facilities are limited. There is a canteen too, but since I don’t visit it much, I’m not aware of the food they provide. We also have a medical room that is better and good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in History and Geography - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Need to heavily work on infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: Not much is known about the placement cell. Internships aren’t provided as well. We have to find internships and placements externally on our own. We do have clubs in our college, but they are just namesake. Very few events, functions, and programs are conducted.
review_content.Infrastructure: We don’t have a hostel for our college, so we have to take PGs nearby. The PGs are very bad, lack hygiene, and the food quality is very poor. The Wi-Fi doesn’t work all around the college. The infrastructure and facilities are very poor, and our college really needs to work on them.

review_summary.college_name: Delhi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DRC is probably the second-best girls' college of DU.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is indeed a little poor at DRC as even Commerce and Economics students find placements hard. The Big 4 that is KPMG, EY, Deloitte, and PwC have been the best recruiters but they also note just a few students. Internship students have to find on their own as college doesn't provide that.
content.Infrastructure: The newly built building is perfect from AC classrooms to smart boards, we have them all. Our canteen too is amazing as it's an all-girls college and our canteen serves a variety of pastries. The only issue is with the auditorium as it needs serious development.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Economics - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best commerce college.

content.Placements: From CUET, students get opportunities for this course, and people choose this course in DCAC. The highest placement is 10 LPA, the average is 5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. At most 70 percent of students get placed everywhere from this course, and the college top recruiting companies are Deloitte, KPMG, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is mid, classrooms are decent, library is excellent. Infrastructure is 5/10, but is good for studies. There is no hostel. Canteen is working, but the food is not that good. Facilities for sports are not as needed, they need to be changed ASAP and work should be done soon.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Economics and Food Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The faculty members are good, but the infrastructure isn’t.

content.Placements: I am not much aware of my college’s placement cell, but there is a cell that provides better placements. About 65–70 percent of students have been placed, from my knowledge. Students mostly find internships online through sites and LinkedIn and apply for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. The Wi-Fi sometimes doesn’t work, and the facilities are limited. There is a canteen too, but since I don’t visit it much, I’m not aware of the food they provide. We also have a medical room that is better and good.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in History and Geography - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Need to heavily work on infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: Not much is known about the placement cell. Internships aren’t provided as well. We have to find internships and placements externally on our own. We do have clubs in our college, but they are just namesake. Very few events, functions, and programs are conducted.
content.Infrastructure: We don’t have a hostel for our college, so we have to take PGs nearby. The PGs are very bad, lack hygiene, and the food quality is very poor. The Wi-Fi doesn’t work all around the college. The infrastructure and facilities are very poor, and our college really needs to work on them.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent college, could be considered as a last resort.

content.Placements: The placements provided by the college are below average. People from the B.A. program do get placements, but it is rare that they will get a good one. High packages are offered by some companies, but few will rarely grasp those. So it would be safe to avoid going to this college if you don't have any other skills other than your degree, if you want a good placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good for a college in a place like Shahdara, but it could have been better. For playing sports, we have a volleyball court and a ground where you can play football, cricket, etc. Hostel facilities are not provided by the college, so students have to make arrangements on their own.

admission_overview.title: DU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DU admission 2026 for UG courses is based on the CUET scores of the candidates. DU PG admissions are based on CUET-PG scores of the candidates. Aspirants who wish to get admission in Delhi University affiliated colleges have to apply and appear for CUET. There is no limit for attempting for CUET-UG or CUET-PG exams. However, getting admission in top DU colleges is competitive due to a large number of applicants, high cutoff and limited seats. Aspirants who pass the accepted exams have to further apply on DU CSAS Portal to provide the college and course preferences. The university offers more than 50 courses. These courses are offered across different levels, such as UG, PG, and Doctoral. Some of the top courses are BA, BSc, BCom, MA. etc. Aspirants can also pursue DU programmes in distance education mode via School of Open Learning, University of Delhi.

faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, the CUET registration 2026 process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribed CUET eligibility criteria to qualify for the entrance exam.
faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?

paragraphs: Students can get admission at University of Delhi by providing a valid CUET score. It is a national-level entrance test. For UG courses, such as BA, BSc, and BCom, the university conducts CUET UG. Students must appear for the exam by taking their DU CUET admit card. DU admission process for UG or PG courses consists of six major steps which include registration for CUET UG or PG, appearance in the relevant exam, registration for DU CSAS, CSAS counselling process, merit list release and seat allocation. Check below the DU admission process in detail:

DU University registrations via CUET usually commence in the last week ofFebruary. CUET registration process commences online. Candidates willing to appear for CUET 2026 exam must fill out the application form online when released. Interested candidates were able to apply online on the official website of CUET UG and CUET PG.

Followed by the application forms of CUET UG and CUET PG, DU will begin the DU CSAS registration for final college and course allotment of students who qualify the exams. The process will begin after the release of CUET-UG andCUET-PG resultswhich are expected to be released in July.

Candidates who have registered for CUET are required to appear for the exam in the subject of their choice and get a valid score.Common University Entrance Test also known asCUET UGis a national-level entrance exam is conducted in online mode.
3.1:Visit https://ugadmission.uod.ac.in/ and register as a new user.
3.2:Fill out the preferences of on andoff campus colleges of duand course combinations. This portal will be used until the admission process of the candidate is not completed.
3.3:There is a one-time CSAS(UG)-2026 application fee that students are required to pay. This fee is non-refundable.
CSAS (UG) - 2026 Application Fee
UR/OBC-NCL/EWS

DU admission 2026 for UG courses is through theCommon Seat Allocation Systemof the University of Delhi. But, at first, it is necessary that aspirants opt for DU during CUET form filling and later apply on the CSAS portal to be eligible for admission.
The admission process afterCUET resultdeclaration is explained below:
Step 4.1:After the declaration of the CUET UG exam, register on the DU CSAS portal in multiple phases. Submit College + Course combination preferences in the order of priority on the CSAS dashboard.
Step 4.2:The university releases DU CSAS Seat Allocation Lists for all categories.

Step 4.3:Once the candidate "Accepts" the provisionally allocated seat, the concerned college will verify the eligibility and documents uploaded by the candidate online. The college has an option to 'Accept' or 'Reject' the admission of the student basis the verification.
CheckDocuments Required for DU Admission
Once the DU-affiliated college accords the approval, candidates will have to pay the 'Admission Fee' to confirm their seats.CheckDU Seat Availability

Delhi University and GGSIPU are some of the prominent universities in India.

Delhi University is one of the most affordable government colleges in India. The fee at DU starts from INR 432 for UG and PG courses. DU seat intake varies course-wise. To get a seat in any of the DU affiliated colleges, candidates are required to pass CUET-UG. Admission to PG courses is based on CUET-PG score. DU has introduced a supernumerary quota for single girl children in its postgraduate (PG) admissions. Starting this admission cycle, the university will reserve one additional seat in every PG course for eligible single girl candidates applying through CUET PG counselling. lists: Candidates applying for BFA will have to pay an additional fee of INR 400 (non-refundable).
For applying to ECA and Sports supernumerary quota, there is an additional fee of INR100 for each quota.
The "freeze" option in seat allocation for CSAS (DU) is to be selected by the students to confirm their admission choice to the allocated on andoff campus colleges of DU.
If candidates are happy with the assigned college and course, they can freeze the request through their dashboard.
Once they select this option, they will not be considered for "upgradation" of choice in further rounds of CSAS.
Candidates must only select this option only if they are satisfied with the allocated seat and want to take admission to this course & college
If they do not choose to upgrade or freeze your admission, their current status will be maintained.

faqs.question: Is BSc (Hons) offered by Delhi University?
faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, DU offers BSc (Hons) and BSc programmes across 19 and 10 specialisations, respectively, of three years' duration. Offered in both honours and general specialisationshe, the honours courses are more specialised and focus on a particular subject area while the general courses are more broad-based and cover a wider range of subjects, such as BSc (General) or BSc (Pass).Out of the 90+ affiliated colleges under DU, more than 25 instituites offer BSc or BSc (Hons) courses t

faqs.question: Can I get admission at DU in a BSc course without CUET?
faqs.answer: No, Delhi University offers admission to the BSc programmes at its colleges based onCUET scoreonly. There is no provision for direct admissions. Hence, aspirants must take theCommon University Entrance Test (CUET). The national-level exam is conducted by National Testing Agency (NTA). It is conducted in different phases. Eligible students can apply on NTA website to take the test. Students seeking admission to DU colleges should select DU college plus preferred course at the time of registration

faqs.question: Can I get DU with 90 percentile?
faqs.answer: In 2023, the competition has reached very high in terms of cutoffs released. The cutoffs had shown a whooping increase over the years and set a bar for the candidates to put a lot of effort. With a mere 90 percentile, candidates won't be able to get admission in DU, they must need to acquire a minimum cutoff of98to secure a seat at Delhi University.

faqs.answer: For admission in Delhi University for BCom, candidates have to follow the process laid down by the University which is to register for the CUET. faqs.answer: Students having less than 60% in Class 12 are also eligible for admission in BCom at DU. They must appear for the CUET UG exam and achieve a valid aggregate in the same. The cutoff trends change from year to year may vary .

faqs.question: How much does BCom at University of Delhi cost?
faqs.answer: Delhi University BCom/ BCom (H) fee structureis cumulative of various components, such as tuition fees, caution money, etc. The total tuition fees for the UG course range fromINR 540 to INR 1 lakh. This fee range is inclusive of course fees at the DU-affiliated colleges. Once final selection is done, candidates need to pay the admission fee amount. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for BCom at Delhi University?
faqs.answer: No, University of Delhi does not offer direct admission to its BCom courses. Earlier, the selection was done based on aspirants Class 12 performance. Now, the aspirants have to appear for the Common University Entrance Test (CUET). This national-level entrance test is conducted by National Testing Agency (NTA) for admission in participating universities/ institutes. Thus, aspirants of BCom at DU must take the exam and secure a valid score that meet the cutoff criteria.
