courses_data.description: Delhi University offers a full-time LLM programme for two to three years at the PG level. This course is offered by Faculty of Law under DU. Candidates who have passed 3 or 5-year LLB degree from DU or any other Indian/ Foreign University with at least 50% aggregate (45% for OBC-NCL/ PwD/ CW and 40% for SC/ ST) or equivalent can apply for the LLM programme. Admission for this course is based on CUET-PG or LLM Entrance Exam scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: Do I need 60% in Class 12 to get admission in DU?
faqs.answer: DU is considered one of the most competitive universities in India for Commerce, Science and Arts education at the undergraduate level. The university and its affiliated colleges was attracting the cream layer of crowd till the time admission was subject to Class 12 scores. While reserved category candidates still had minor chances of getting into a not-so-popular course of DU with 60% in Class 12, a General category student with 60% had no chance of getting into any good college or course at DU.However, starting 2022, DU admission process has shifted to CUET-UG based admission process. Those with a valid score in CUET UG exam who have passed their Class 12 are eligible to take admission now. While the chances of getting into a good DU college are still low at this score, the chances of getting a seat have increased now (provided you score extremely well in CUET UG).

faqs.question: What is the minimum percentage required in Class 12 to be eligible for BSc in DU?
faqs.answer: There is no minimum aggregate requirements to get into a BSc course of Delhi University. The students seeking admission must be Class 12 or equivalent examination pass to get admission. Eligible candidates can further go to the CUET website to register and apply as just meeting the eligibility requirement is not enough.

faqs.question: Is DU admission open?
faqs.answer: DU admissionis open. Admission in Delhi University is based on CUET-UG & CUET-PG scores. Below are the upcoming events for DU admission:University of Delhi (DU) has released the admission cutoff for 5-yr integrated BA LLB and BBA LLB courses through Common Law Admission Test (CLAT) scores.The CUET PG 2026 registration process for admission to PG courses is expected to begin in Jan 2026.DU CSAS-PG 2025 Spot Round 3 allocations have been released for admission to various PG courses based on the CUET-PG 2025 scores, and the last date for fee payment isAug 20, 2025.

placement_data.title: DU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Delhi University has active and dedicated Centralised Placement Cell (CPC) that facilitates all types of placement-related activities. DU students registered with CPC get placement assistance , employment counselling and entrepreneurship training as well. The CPC also organises workshops and seminars on present-day industry needs for students to become successful professionals.

DU placement process is conducted through Centralized Placement Cell and Department Placement Cell, which varies from college to college. Meanwhile, the peak placement period is between August and December . However, it may vary depending upon the college and department. As per the annual report 2024 , 15373 students applied for placement 2024 and 1766 students were placed. According to DU NIRF report 2025 , the median package offered to UG 3-year and PG 2-year students during placements 2024 stood at INR 5.5 LPA and INR 16.7 LPA , respectively.
DU Annual Report 2023-24

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during DU placements?
faqs.answer: Leading Delhi University colleges such as SRCC and Lady Shri Ram College students received the highest package of INR 35 LPA and INR 48.9 LPA, respectively. DU Colleges like Jesus & Mary College and Gargi College got the highest package of INR 23.05 LPA. Earlier, during placements 2023, the highest package offered to Hindu College and Kirori Mal College students INR 36.5 LPA and INR 51 LPA.

faqs.question: How to prepare for DU placements?
faqs.answer: Delhi University has a decent record of placements for courses like BTech, MBA, BCA, MBBS, etc. The course-wise placement details are yet to be released on the offcial website. However, the DU has released the NIRF report 2024 on its offcial website which include the placement details for the batch 2023. highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is DU. Numerous national and international ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #15 rank in the Overall category, #5 under University, and #12 under Research Institutions. DU is also ranked internationally by QS World Rankings 2025 at #328 position. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around DU rankings.

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Delhi In 2025
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Delhi In 2025

nirf.description:
DU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for DU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, DU climbed 1 rank to #5 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been noticed that in the 'Research Institutions' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, DU climbed 2 ranks to #12 rank in the 'Research Institutions' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook, DU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the DU's rankings in 'Central Universities' category have demonstrated an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, DU climbed 1 rank to #3 rank in the 'Central Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
DU has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the QS World University Rankings 2026. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the DU's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have displayed a fluctuating trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2026, DU's rank is #328, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Asia' category have demonstrated a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, DU fell 14 ranks to #95 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Rankings achieved by the institute under the 'Southern Asia' category have exibited a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, DU fell 2 ranks to #10 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Daulat Ram College, University of DelhiReviewed on 11 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: DRC is probably the second-best girls' college of DU.
reviews.review_text: The newly built building is perfect from AC classrooms to smart boards, we have them all. Our canteen too is amazing as it's an all-girls college and our canteen serves a variety of pastries. The only issue is with the auditorium as it needs serious development.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Delhi College of Arts and Commerce, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The best commerce college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is mid, classrooms are decent, library is excellent. Infrastructure is 5/10, but is good for studies. There is no hostel. Canteen is working, but the food is not that good. Facilities for sports are not as needed, they need to be changed ASAP and work should be done soon.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Aditi Mahavidyalaya, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are good, but the infrastructure isn’t.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not that good. The Wi-Fi sometimes doesn’t work, and the facilities are limited. There is a canteen too, but since I don’t visit it much, I’m not aware of the food they provide. We also have a medical room that is better and good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditi Mahavidyalaya, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Need to heavily work on infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: We don’t have a hostel for our college, so we have to take PGs nearby. The PGs are very bad, lack hygiene, and the food quality is very poor. The Wi-Fi doesn’t work all around the college. The infrastructure and facilities are very poor, and our college really needs to work on them.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shyam Lal College, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college, could be considered as a last resort.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good for a college in a place like Shahdara, but it could have been better. For playing sports, we have a volleyball court and a ground where you can play football, cricket, etc. Hostel facilities are not provided by the college, so students have to make arrangements on their own.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Ram Lal Anand College, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has decent faculty and crowd.
reviews.review_text: Classes with AC and smart boards, a decent faculty with good facilities, including perfect benches, available Wi-Fi, and a good library, but insufficient reading material. There are no labs for political science students. The college does not provide hostels. Students live in PGs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maitreyi College, University of DelhiReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College is fine, as it is only for girls, so it is better.
reviews.review_text: There are plenty of facilities here, and there is Wi-Fi in the college. There is also a library in which all books, etc., are available. There is a canteen near the library where you don't get much good food. You get samosas and some other snacks. The college does not have its own hostel. According to me, everyone lives in private PGs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hansraj College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Hansraj College, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are top-notch. There are air-conditioned libraries, laboratories, cafeterias and classrooms. The entire campus has Wi-Fi. So it is very comfortable for students. The hostel is very affordable and comfortable. The mess food is amazing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Venkateswara College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My experience of SVC Delhi.
reviews.review_text: There are two buildings in our college and 3 blocks. It has big classrooms with modern teaching methods. The college has a canteen, and the food there is affordable. It has sports facilities like outdoor and indoor games. Overall, the facilities are good and luxurious.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Daulat Ram College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure, and faculty, and not great ROI.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are decent, Wi-Fi works but can be slow, and the library is very good with lots of study space. Hostel facilities are okay, mess food is average, and the canteen is better. Basic medical help and sports facilities are available. Hostel rooms are okay and manageable, mess food is average (some days better than others), and the canteen is more popular than the mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Ramanujan College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Ramanujan College, Delhi University.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is better than other colleges. A new wing is under construction and will be ready to use in about 2–3 months. Classrooms have sufficient space for 60 students, the library is spacious, Wi-Fi is available, and the canteen is also available with good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindu College, University of DelhiReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good. To be honest, I consider this college as the best decision of my life.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are upgraded and provide the best output to each and every student, be it Wi-Fi for classes, labs for experiments, or classrooms to study. Food is moderate, to be honest, because it is prepared in large bulk, but it’s more than sufficient for the need. faqs.answer: Raja Rajeswari Medical College and Hospital (RMCH) in Bangalore offers the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) program.The college also provides internships with the help of two hospital buildings attached to the college and one PHC center in the village area. The average placement package for MBBS graduates is around 6 LPA, and there are ample job opportunities outside the campus, with an average salary of 50-60 thousand per month. The college also prepares students for the National Exit Test (NExT), a combined single-window exam for MBBS students to qualify for admission into postgraduate courses as well as to obtain the license to practice medicine in India. For the MBBS program at RMCH, the NEET cut-off for the General category candidates in the All India quota was 412709 in 2022. The college has 250 seats for the MBBS program. To be admitted to the MBBS course at RMCH, candidates must qualify for the NEET UG entrance exam conducted by NTA. The course duration for MBBS at RMCH is 4.6 years, plus a 1-year internship.

overview_faqs.answer: Rohilkhand Medical College and Hospital (RMCH) in Bareilly, India, has a good MBBS program. The college has a well-equipped hospital with a 1160-bed facility that provides medical students with complete assistance and training in the medical industry. The college provides good internships, and many patients visit the hospital, so it's a good way for the budding doctors and the hospital consultancy. The average placement package is around 6 LPA for MBBS, and placements for MBBS or any other medical course are never a problem as there are ample job opportunities outside the campus.

admission_process.title: RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital offers UG, PG and doctorate-level courses in Medical Sciences. Some of the medical courses offered at RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospitaland Hospital are MBBS, MD and PhD. Admission 2025 to the courses offered at RRMCH is entrance-based.

Courses in design are available at the RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital in a variety of specialisations, including Remedial Biology, Remedial Mathematics and Remedial Biology-Practical. Aspiring applicants must complete the selection criteria and fulfil the eligibility requirements for each course to be admitted to one of Moople's courses. The table below provides details regarding the eligibility and selection criteria for a range of popular undergraduate courses:

RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital course admissions 2025are entrance-based. Candidates can apply for their preferred course after checking the eligibility criteria. Below are the steps to get a seat in RajaRajeswari Medical College:
STEP 1: RajaRajeswari Medical College and HospitalApplicationProcess 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates can register online or download the application form for offline submission. Aspirants will need to fill out the details and upload their marksheet to complete the application process.
STEP 2: Selection

Candidates are selected based on the entrance exam of the course they want to be enrolled in. RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospitalaccepts results of various entrance exams such asNEET,NEET PG.The institute may conduct an entrance exam to shortlist aspirants.
Admission confirmation:

Selected candidates are then required to secure their admission within the prescribed date and time at the institute campus by depositing relevant fee via debit card, credit card, internet banking, UPI or DD.

cut_off.college_name: RMCH Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: RMCH cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

RMCH NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 541606 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
RMCH MBBS cutoff 2025 was 541606 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

RMCH accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

RMCH NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 52841 to 191100. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the RMCH MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Radiodiagnosis, followed by MD in Pharmacology and MD in Microbiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 52841, 188334 and 191100, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

RMCH NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to M.Ch., DM courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing ranks ranged from 2291 to 5377, wherein M.Ch. in Urology proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 2291 for M.Ch. in Urology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 6290.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.

Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for RajaRajeswari Medical College and Hospital. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

reviews.review_heading: It is a prominent medical campus.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, students should stay in the hostel even though they are very near to the college. Because most of the time, we were required to visit some other hospitals for experienced practical training. To avoid delays, all of us requested to stay in hostels. The food provided in the hostel was acceptable to eat, but it was not nutritious.

reviews.review_heading: Faculties are good security is also good enough 30+ security gaurd is their
reviews.review_text: Campus is good, very well maintained garden is also thee. There is ground for cricket, valley ball and basketball. Hostel is also good but mess but is average. Other all things are good enough. For WiFi you have to take permission from faculties in hostel and warden is 24hr available for us.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for MS in Orthopedics.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has air-conditioned spacious classrooms and well-maintained labs, a cricket ground, a football ground, and a basketball court. The college had Wi-Fi and a huge library. The Hostel had single-room or double-room facilities with attached bathrooms, electricity, AC facilities, and we also had the option of a canteen. There is a lot of variety of tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: Happy with the faculty members and placement.
reviews.review_text: We had hostel which had single room facility, with electricity, food, water and AC facility available. The washrooms were attached in each room and we also had canteen option. We had spacious classroom and good labs maintenance also the college had Wi-Fi and huge library.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and faculty. I am disappointed with placements.
reviews.review_text: We have air-conditioned classrooms, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, a cricket ground, a football ground, a basketball court, an ACS convention center, and good lab facilities. Each room has 2 students. The hostel fee is Rs. 5 lakh. Rooms have attached bathrooms. Hostel food varies a lot. Dinner is quite good, whereas breakfast is average and lunch is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: My experience with one of the best private colleges.
reviews.review_text:
Very good campus with almost every facilities there is a cricket ground
Football field basketball throwball swimming pool gym and the practical labs are just amazing with each and every facility a medical college needs with very good teaching staff here.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with student-friendly teachers who provide good education.
reviews.review_text: It is a good campus. We have a swimming pool, playground and all other sports options. Classrooms are good and have air-conditioners installed with good seating arrangements. The campus is always kept clean, and we have good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges to study MBBS.
reviews.review_text: College has a modern infrastructure with well-equipped labs. Library has around 22,000 books. Classrooms are well maintained, spacious, and equipped with modern technology like a projector. Hostel is very nice and the room is spacious, which is very neat and well cleaned. Toilets are also well cleaned. Food isn't that great. Medical facilities are very good. Hospital is very big and contains around 1,300 beds, where students can study patients. Sports and games aren't that great, only small game...

reviews.review_heading: I did a postgraduate course in Orthopedics.
reviews.review_text: There is a strict requirement of wearing a uniform all day without any excuses and also won't be allowed inside without the proper dress code.  Food prepared in the college hostels is hygienic and acceptable to eat.

reviews.review_heading: We get guaranteed job offers in a multispeciality hospital.
reviews.review_text: Libraries keep up to date with new books to know about the developing newer technologies and keep us updated with the same. It's mandatory to follow the dress code approved by the institution. College is enriched with resources and updated technologies.

faqs.answer: A:    The data related to KLE University BPharma placements has not been released by the university. However, KLE University NIRF report 2024 is available. Based on the report, the median package offered during UG 4-year placements in 2023 was INR 3 LPA. A total of 116 UG students were placed during KLE University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) students in 2022 was also INR 3 LPA. In 2021, it was INR 6.8 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for B.Pharma at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the data at the University's official website, the highest package offered at KLE Technological University during 2021 placements stood at INR 11.4 LPA. The average package offered for UG courses was 6.8 LPA and 87 students were placed out of 297 students and for PG courses the average package was 11.6 LPA and the number of students placed was 124 out of 223.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    KLE Technological University provided many great opportunities to the students for placement in the recent years. Many companies visited the university and recruited a large amount of students in the year 2021. The list of the top recruiters of KLE Technological  University in the year 2021 is presented below: Fortis Escort HospitalKIIMS Hospital Jehangir HospitalHospitality
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    BPharma graduates of KLE University can build a career in the healthcare, pharmaceutical research, and the pharmaceutical industry. as Pharmacists, Drug Inspectors, Clinical Pharmacists, Chemical Technicians, Medical Writers, Medical Representatives, etc. They are also eligible for various government sector jobs in their field. To advance their knowledge, candidates can also pursue an MPharma. For more information, vist: Career scope after BPharma
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing B.Pharma at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    B.Sc. Nursing, Anaesthesia Technology, B.Sc. Cardiac Care Technology, B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology, Neuroscience Technology, Perfusion Technology, B.Sc. Radiology, and B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology are among the Allied BSc courses that KLE University provides. For these courses, there are often between 10 and 100 seats available. There are ten seats available for each of the B.Sc. programmes in anaesthesia technology, radiology, and neuroscience technology. Further, there are 15 places available for each of the B.Sc. programmes in Perfusion Technology and Cardiac Care Technology. For the B.Sc. Nursing programme, KLE University offers 100 seats. The university has reportedly announced a total of 160 seats for this academic year.
faqs.question: How many students can do B.Sc at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    KLE University accepts various entrance exam scores for admission to different programs. The specific exam accepted for a particular programme depends on the program's requirements. For undergraduate programs, common exams include the KLE Scholastic Aptitude Test (KLE SAT), Joint Entrance Examination Main (JEE Main), Consortium of Medical, Engineering and Dental Colleges of Karnataka (COMEDK) Undergraduate Entrance Test (UGET), and National Eligibility Test (NEET). For postgraduate programs, common exams include the Postgraduate Common Entrance Test (PGCET), Graduate Pharmacy Aptitude Test (GPAT), Common Admission Test (CAT), and Management Aptitude Test (MAT).
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    The Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) programme is offered at Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and Research. The course lasts for 66 months (full time). It is a course level for UG degrees. The entire cost of tuition is approximately INR 82.35 lakh. Other components than tuition fees may be included in the fees. The fees associated with an internship that is required may not be included in the annual fees range. According to the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), DGHS, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, the aforementioned cost is applicable. Additionally, the university provides internships with a median pay of Rs. 4.08 Lacs per year.
faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBBS programmes at KLE University?

faqs.answer: A:    For some courses, students are chosen based on their NEET scores; however, for other courses, they must take the university's entrance exam. The National Testing Agency will administer NEET (UG) to applicants for admission to MBBS and BDS programmes. Counselling will be conducted based on NEET merit by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), Directorate General of Health Services (DGHS), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, New Delhi. Your NEET score will be the determining factor of getting a seat in KLE University. So far no other entrance exams are said to be conducted by the University regarding MBBS.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does KLE University accept for admission to MBBS?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with my admission in the college.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students got placed. The average package offered is 15 LPA in KLE Prabhakar Kore Hospital. 100% of students got internships in KLE Hospital as doctors. It is a great place to study, if your interested in studies then it is a great place as well thus allowing ample opportunities. Skill lab allowing visualization.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library has AC. The study room allows us to study in the comfort of our hostel room. There is a table, chair, cot, fan, and almirah in a room, and big enough to allow playing football in the room itself. A water cooler to quench the thirst in the scorching heat of Belgaum.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides one of the best campus facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our course has limited seating; the previous year's batch consisted of around seven students, most of whom secured placements in reputable companies and research institutions such as ICMR. A few have even applied for Ph.D. programs in the same course at our college. In the final year, we have a compulsory three-month internship, and students have completed internships at research institutes like the National AIDS Research Institute in Pune, ICMR, and other R&D institutes. Some have also interned at biotech and pharmaceutical companies such as Huwel Lifescience Pvt Ltd in Hyderabad, Tulip Pvt Ltd in Goa, and Biocon in Bangalore.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBBS programmes at KLE University?
overview_faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) programme is offered at Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and Research. The course lasts for 66 months (full time). It is a course level for UG degrees. The entire cost of tuition is approximately INR 82.35 lakh. Other components than tuition fees may be included in the fees. The fees associated with an internship that is required may not be included in the annual fees range. According to the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), DGHS, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, the aforementioned cost is applicable. Additionally, the university provides internships with a median pay of Rs. 4.08 Lacs per year.

overview_faqs.question: Is BPharma available at KLE University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, KLE University offers a BPharma at its Belgavi, Bangalore and Hubballi campuses. The UG-level programme is available in modes of regular and lateral entry (to the third semester). The programme is spread across four years. The total course duration is further divided in eight semesters. BPharma admission at the university is based on the scores of KAHER-AIET/KCET. BPharma fee at KLE University is INR 6.44 lakh. Candidates must note that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for four-year BPharma at KLE University?
overview_faqs.answer: The KLE University BPharma tuition fee is INR 6.44 Lacs for four years. Other components inlcuded in the KLE University fees are security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, institute security deposit, grade card, and more have to be paid once at the time of admission. It must be noted that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: KLE University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: KLE will help you get into a fine hospital in Europe as well as the Middle East.

content.Placements: The college offers only 100 intakes for the bachelor's degree, and there are usually no placements, but I guess there are opportunities for the master's to get placed in Canada.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and the sports events are handled and organized in a good manner. The skill labs include the latest technology. I won't recommend the hostel facility because the food isn't good, as many of my friends said, but the rooms of the hostel are overall okayish. The practicals are done well, and almost all the equipment for physiotherapy is available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Why JNMC may or may not be for you.

content.Placements: JNMC adds a strong value to your resume. USMLE is given significant importance. Research opportunities are abundant, and teachers are supportive. We travel to different countries to showcase our research. The hospital is very large, with a 2400-bed capacity, providing excellent hands-on experience.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has a general store, bookstore, temple, cafe, sports complex, skill lab, playground, gym, and dairy. The girls' hostel also has a cafe, salon, laundry, and gym. Washrooms in the college do not have soap. Wi-Fi is available. But it is a bit slow. The food is good, and the cafe is very affordable.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with my admission in the college.

content.Placements: 100% of students got placed. The average package offered is 15 LPA in KLE Prabhakar Kore Hospital. 100% of students got internships in KLE Hospital as doctors. It is a great place to study, if your interested in studies then it is a great place as well thus allowing ample opportunities. Skill lab allowing visualization.
content.Infrastructure: Library has AC. The study room allows us to study in the comfort of our hostel room. There is a table, chair, cot, fan, and almirah in a room, and big enough to allow playing football in the room itself. A water cooler to quench the thirst in the scorching heat of Belgaum.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college provides one of the best campus facilities.

content.Placements: Our course has limited seating; the previous year's batch consisted of around seven students, most of whom secured placements in reputable companies and research institutions such as ICMR. A few have even applied for Ph.D. programs in the same course at our college. In the final year, we have a compulsory three-month internship, and students have completed internships at research institutes like the National AIDS Research Institute in Pune, ICMR, and other R&D institutes. Some have also interned at biotech and pharmaceutical companies such as Huwel Lifescience Pvt Ltd in Hyderabad, Tulip Pvt Ltd in Goa, and Biocon in Bangalore.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The life in JNMC, Belagavi.

content.Placements: In medical college, there are usually no placements. There are just internships and after that, if you wish to work somewhere as an MBBS graduate then JNMC as a college on your resume will look strong as this institution goes back to 1963. Many people have cracked NEET PG from here, and the clinical knowledge you get from the patient flow is amazing.
content.Infrastructure: There is a campus with Wi-Fi that works throughout with good internet speed. There is a world-class library present here. I genuinely love the library as there is no book on medicine, you won't find here. The catalogue is vast and impressive. There is also a reading room that is open for students 24/7. Labs here are also world-class and they incorporated newer technologies into curriculum to enhance the learning process. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and ACs and are generally well thought out.

admission_overview.college_name: KLE University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection and Dates

paragraphs: KLE University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as NEET, NEET-PG, KCET for admission to specific courses.KLE Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Medicine, Pharmacy, Science, etc.

KLE University offers more than 25 courses in full-time mode. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to get admission. Below are theKLE University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

KLE University offers admission to most of the courses based on entrance-exam scores. Aspirants first need to apply for their preferred course to participate in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat at KLE University:
STEP 1: KLE University Application Process 2025
Candidates need to apply online on the official website of the university. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to register for most of the UG and PG courses.
STEP 2: Selection

The university shortlists candidates based on their entrance-exam score or merit in the last qualifying exam. KLE considers NEET scores for MBBS, BAMS, BHMS and BDS. NEET-PG is score is required to get admission in MD, MS, MDS and PG diploma courses.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection process is over, candidates need to participate in the counselling and seat allotment process. NEET-qualified candidates are required to participate in counselling conducted by the Medical Counseling Committee (MCC) / Karnataka Examination Authority (KEA) / AYUSH Admission Central Counseling Committee (AACCC). Selected aspirants must pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: How many students can do B.Sc at KLE University?
faqs.answer: B.Sc. Nursing, Anaesthesia Technology, B.Sc. Cardiac Care Technology, B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology, Neuroscience Technology, Perfusion Technology, B.Sc. Radiology, and B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology are among the Allied BSc courses that KLE University provides. For these courses, there are often between 10 and 100 seats available. There are ten seats available for each of the B.Sc. programmes in anaesthesia technology, radiology, and neuroscience technology. Further, there are 15 places available for each of the B.Sc. programmes in Perfusion Technology and Cardiac Care Technology. For the B.Sc. Nursing programme, KLE University offers 100 seats. The university has reportedly announced a total of 160 seats for this academic year.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by KLE University?
faqs.answer: KLE University accepts various entrance exam scores for admission to different programs. The specific exam accepted for a particular programme depends on the program's requirements. For undergraduate programs, common exams include the KLE Scholastic Aptitude Test (KLE SAT), Joint Entrance Examination Main (JEE Main), Consortium of Medical, Engineering and Dental Colleges of Karnataka (COMEDK) Undergraduate Entrance Test (UGET), and National Eligibility Test (NEET). For postgraduate programs, common exams include the Postgraduate Common Entrance Test (PGCET), Graduate Pharmacy Aptitude Test (GPAT), Common Admission Test (CAT), and Management Aptitude Test (MAT).

faqs.question: What is the selection process for B.Sc and what is the minimum CUET score required?
faqs.answer: KLE University provides various aug courses to students pursuing B.Sc in their university. The different courses provided for B.Sc are B.Sc in nursing, B.Sc in radiology, B.Sc in Anaesthasia Technology, B.Sc in a euro Science Tdchnology, B.Sc in Perfusion Tdchnology. Students have to give the KCET exam for admission in KLE University for B.Sc courses. Further students can check for the cutoff list of the college from the link provided below and can further apply for the college admission on their official website.https://www.shiksha.com/university/kle-academy-of-higher-education-and-research-belgaum-22227/cutoff

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does KLE University accept for admission to MBBS?
faqs.answer: For some courses, students are chosen based on their NEET scores; however, for other courses, they must take the university's entrance exam. The National Testing Agency will administer NEET (UG) to applicants for admission to MBBS and BDS programmes. Counselling will be conducted based on NEET merit by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), Directorate General of Health Services (DGHS), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, New Delhi. Your NEET score will be the determining factor of getting a seat in KLE University. So far no other entrance exams are said to be conducted by the University regarding MBBS.

placement_report.college_name: KLE University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: KLE University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per KLE University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA , INR 3 LPA and INR 3.8 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year , PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at I NR 17.64 LPA , INR 4.2 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is released. As per the report, 116 UG and 335 PG students were placed during KLE University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) and UG (5-year) students was INR 3 LPA and INR 6 LPA . For PG courses, the median package offered during KLE University placements 2022 ranged between INR 3.35 LPA and INR 11.4 LPA, respectively.
KLE University Placements 2022:

data: KLE University Placements 2022: The median package for UG (5-year) courses increased by nearly 67% in 2022 when compared with 2021 The median package for PG (6-year) courses decreased by nearly 7% in 2022 when compared with 2021

faqs.question: What is the highest paying job in Tourism?
faqs.answer: Food and Beverage Director and General Manager of a premier international hotel chain hold highest earning position in Tourism industry. Food & Beverage Director is responsible for managing all parts of organization's food and beverage planning and service like - menu planning costing preparing and presenting food and beverages adhering to quality and safety requirements

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at KLE University?
faqs.answer: According to the data at the University's official website, the highest package offered at KLE Technological University during 2021 placements stood at INR 11.4 LPA. The average package offered for UG courses was 6.8 LPA and 87 students were placed out of 297 students and for PG courses the average package was 11.6 LPA and the number of students placed was 124 out of 223.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of KLE University?
faqs.answer: KLE Technological University provided many great opportunities to the students for placement in the recent years. Many companies visited the university and recruited a large amount of students in the year 2021. The list of the top recruiters of KLE Technological University in the year 2021 is presented below: Fortis Escort Hospital KIIMS Hospital Jehangir Hospital Hospitality

faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for B.Pharma at KLE University?
faqs.answer: The data related to KLE University BPharma placements has not been released by the university. However, KLE University NIRF report 2024 is available. Based on the report, the median package offered during UG 4-year placements in 2023 was INR 3 LPA . A total of 116 UG students were placed during KLE University placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) students in 2022 was also INR 3 LPA. In 2021, it was INR 6.8 LPA.

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, KLE University is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #151-200 in the NIRF 2025 under the Overall category, #101-150 under University, and #11-50 under Sustainable Development Goals. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around KLE University rankings:

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Karnataka In 2025

nirf.description:
KLE University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, KLE University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, KLE University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

comparison.college: JSS Academy of Higher Education & Research

outlook.description:
As per the overall score, KLE University has been placed at a good position by the Outlook under the 'Deemed To Be University' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

qs_world.description:
KLE University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for KLE University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, KLE University fell 180 ranks to #681 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been noticed that in the 'Southern Asia' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, KLE University fell 69 ranks to #212 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

library.description:
Library consists 62530 Text Books, 49385 Reference Books, 7135 e-Books, 11431 Journals, 1339 e-Journals, 06 Digital Database, 2534 CD & Video and uses KOHA, E-lib Library Management Software. Digital Library is developed in an approximate 2000 sq. ft. carpet area on the ground floor of the Library Building. UG, PG, & Staff are provided with separate space.
Libraries have E-learning resources like e-database, e-books, e-Shodha Ganga, e-journals ICT and smart class, production of teaching modules and interactive learning, MED RC Server, Helinet, Science Direct, Access to Cochrane database, INFLIBNET and “Sakshat.ac.in” through 1 GBPS lease line obtained through NMEICT. The institution has various software computing facilities like WINDOWS XP, Windows 7, MS Office 2007, MS Office 2010, Adobe reader, Customized Application Software for administrative purpose, Tally-ERP-9 for account section, SPSS software latest version no. 21 for research, website updation software, etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Table Tennis, 400 mts. Running Synthetic Track, Volleyball

The teachers are also dedicated to their work and friendly to the students, but only the principal (in every college) is very strict about the professionalism of the students.

Classrooms are huge and comfortable with AC facilities. The library is well-equipped. There's a sports complex and swimming pool, gym and athletic track. Mess and hostel are okay, but there are many cafes on the campus, which are very good.

paragraphs: The Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) programme is offered at Jawaharlal Nehru Medical College, KLE Academy of Higher Education and Research. The course lasts for 66 months (full time). It is a course level for UG degrees. The entire cost of tuition is approximately INR 82.35 lakh. Other components than tuition fees may be included in the fees. The fees associated with an internship that is required may not be included in the annual fees range. According to the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), DGHS, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, the aforementioned cost is applicable. Additionally, the university provides internships with a median pay of Rs. 4.08 Lacs per year.

The KLE University BPharma tuition fee is INR 6.44 Lacs for four years. Other components inlcuded in the KLE University fees are security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, etc. The one-time charges, such as library security deposit, institute security deposit, grade card, and more have to be paid once at the time of admission. It must be noted that this fee is sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

college_info.intro:
Among the several courses at Nirma University Ahmedabad a few stand out as the flagship programmes of the institute which are its BTech and MSc courses. The BTech programme is extended across seven specialisations while the MSc course is in three specialisations. These courses have been extended under the Nirma Institute of Technology Ahmedabad a constituent of the university and is is well-known for providing education to students in Technology and Engineering.
Nirma University BTech students can go for a range of technical careers or roles in Data Analysis, Programming, Cloud Computing, etc. but they can also opt for non-technical careers after completing their education. BTech students can become Customer Success Managers, Sales Representatives, and Marketing Managers or can take up a range of job opportunities relevant to their field. Students also have the option for pursuing a dual BTech - MBA programme at the university. While the MSc course is offered for the duration of 2 years in full-time mode.
Another popular programme is the Nirma University Ahmedabad MBA which can also be taken as a dual course alongside BTech. There are a total of 3 specialisations for MBA including:
With the Nirma MBA fees usually ranging between INR 10.24 Lakhs and INR 23.3 Lakhs depending on course specialisation. A few other popular courses at Nirma University Gota, along with their respective eligibility and Nirma University Ahmedabad fees is given here:

placements.overview:
The latest Nirma University placement 2025 data has not been released yet. Though the University does has a placement and training cell for its students and one can view the 2024 placement data which shows the highest and average package offered during Nirma University BTech placements 2024 being INR 52.25 LPA and INR 8.30 LPA, respectively.

Also while the Nirma University MBA average package for 2025 has not been released yet, the highest and average packages stood at INR 70 LPA and INR 11.22 LPA, respectively in 2024 with a 100% placement rate. While for the BDesprogram, highest and average package stood at 11.04 LPA and 5.5 LPA.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered is 19.5 LPA. The average is 7 LPA. Top recruiters are SAM, CAM, AZB, Trilegal, and Khaitan. The campus recruitment cell assists students in getting internships right from the first year itself. From NGIs to advocates, a database is maintained and is released to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus houses the building of all other departments. For ILNU, there are 4 floors in the building, from basement to 3rd floor. There is a moot court hall and a seminar hall. All classrooms have projectors, and smart classrooms are mostly on the 3rd floor. There are 4 hostels on campus: 3 for male students and 1 for female students, each having 4 floors. The mess provides meals 4 times a day. There is also a stadium and a medical facility on campus.

course_faqs.answer: Yes, students have to work on a project in the last semester of the Nirma University BPharm programme. The project should be on a topic related to pharmacy. Its project file/papers must include complete details around the topic and the work done by the students during the process. Students can contact the department/faculty members to gather more information.

review_summary.college_name: Nirma University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great private college for B.Tech.

content.Placements: I am still in my second year of mechanical engineering, but I know a bit about this year's placements. Our sir told us that this year, only a few students got placed with a maximum package of about 15 LPA in mechanical engineering. It seemed as if the students were only able to answer theoretical questions and not real-life application problems. Because studying here is very monotonous and boring. The placements this year were fewer than last year.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure-wise, Nirma is top-notch. They have a class with AC in some blocks and a spacious place. We have a good football and cricket ground. Basketball courts and volleyball courts are also there. There is a 5-storey library on campus, which is the best place to study during exams, and even though it is big, it is silent. There are many books from all departments and topics. We have 4 canteens with great food and great service. 2 of them close at about 4-6 pm, and the other 2 stay till 10 pm. The hostel mess also includes great food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Students life at Nirma University.

content.Placements: Mostly 95 percent of students are placed in campus placements. Some students choose to pursue a master’s degree for further studies. The highest package is 80 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package offered is 8 LPA. Companies that frequently hire students on campus include Infosys, TCS, JPMC, Oracle, and Deloitte.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is surrounded by greenery. The architecture of the buildings is modern, with Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, and projectors. The classroom design is awesome. The library is modern and has six floors. The hostel facility is good. Multiple sports grounds, meetup places, and two or three canteens are available for students to relax and socialize.

individual_reviews.title: Nirma University is a good private college.

content.Placements: Approximately, we have 80 students in one class, and two such classes. Placements are getting better year by year. The highest package in the ECE stream is approximately 53 LPA. The top recruiters are Google, NVIDIA, Amazon, Adani, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All rooms are air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi facility is available for free. There is proper parking space, and the campus is surrounded by greenery. The canteen is affordable, hygienic, and offers the best food. There are four canteens K canteen, Pharma canteen, Law canteen, and MBA canteen and all of them are excellent. Labs are also well-equipped and among the best. The college has the best infrastructure and a peaceful environment without any stress.

admission_overview.title: Nirma University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Nirma University admission is based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The university accepts scores in national or state-level entrance exams such as CAT, GUJCET, CMAT, JEE Main, etc. Nirma University also conducts its own entrance test for a few courses. The university offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in streams such as Design, Architecture, Law, Pharmacy, etc. The university offers courses via its institutes such as Institute of Technology, Institute of Management, Institute of Pharmacy, and Institute of Commerce, among others. Candidates can apply on the university's website for the preferred course.

eligibility_selection.title: Nirma University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The university offers courses in the fields of Science, Technology, Arts, and Commerce. The selection process also varies from course to course. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria of some of the top Nirma University courses: Courses

faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass HSc examination or any other equivalent examination with at least 60% aggregate to apply for Nirma University BBA + MBA programme. For admission under Gujarat State Category, aspirants need to pass HSc examination with a minimum of 90% aggregate within Gujarat.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BBA at Nirma University?

faqs.answer: Nirma University Cutoff 2024 was released for BArch and BTech courses. The cutoff was released throughout a few rounds for different categories under the All India and Home State category candidates. The cutoff for BArch was closed at 22002 for the General All India category candidates. For the General Home State category candidates, the cutoff was closed at 12057 for BArch. For BTech courses, the lowest required among the General Home State category candidates was 302.
faqs.question: What is the lowest rank to get into Nirma University?

faqs.answer: To get admission to BArch or BTech specialisations at Nirma University through JEE Main, a student must acquire the required rank. To get admission to BArch, General Home State category, a candidate must have a rank of 12057. For the General Home State category candidates, the cutoff for BArch was closed at 22002.For admission to BTech courses, the cutoff ranks for the General Home State category candidates closed between 302 and 10642. Candidates can view all the cutoff related information for Nirma University here.
faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get Nirma University?

faqs.answer: For admission to the Nirma University BPharm programme students must have passed 12th from a recognised board. The qualifying exam should have been passed with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects and any of Mathematics, Biotechnology or Biology.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get admission to BPharm programme at Nirma University?

paragraphs: Nirma University application forms for all the courses is filled online. Candidates have to pay an application fee to submit the form. Application fee for top courses is below:
INR 350 (for the students appearing the qualifying examination from the state of Gujarat including Diu, Daman and Dadra Nagar Haveli)
INR 1,200 (Outside students)
2. Selection Process

Nirma University admission to most of the courses is entrance based. Candidates are shortlisted based on entrance exam like CAT for MBA, JEE Main/ GUJCET for BTech, CMAT for MCA and others. For some courses admission is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Personal interview is conducted for BBA, MBA and other courses.
3. Release of selection list

The university releases a merit list with the names of the students selected for the respective course. Candidates with scores equal and above theNirma University cutoffare called for document verification.
4. Admission Fee Payment
The shortlisted candidates receive admission offer. The university offers seats to candidates under the All India and State Categories. You can confirm the seats by paying theNirma University fee.

Apart from entrance exam, the university also considers the academic performance of the students.

placement_data.title: Nirma University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Nirma University placement report 2025 is not released. According to the official report, the highest and average package recorded during Nirma University placement 2024 for BTech was INR 52.25 LPA and 8.3 LPA . 286 companies visited in 2024.

The highest and average package recorded during Nirma University MBA placement 2024 was I NR 70 LPA and 11.22 LPA . 100% MBA placement rate was recorded in 2024. For BDes program , highest and average package recorded in 2024 was 11.04 LPA and 5.5 LPA .
For MTech and MCA programs , the highest package in 2023 was 20.46 LPA . 163 students were placed in 2023. In BCom course , highest and average package in 2023 was 5.63 LPA and 3.8 LPA .

faqs.answer: The median package offered during Nirma University MBA placements 2024 stood at INR 10.5 LPA. In 2023 and 2022, the median package recorded was 11 LPA and 10 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy for Nirma University MBA?
faqs.answer: Nirma University follows a refund policy in case of cancellation of admission. The 80% and 50% fee is refunded only if the seat vacant against the cancellation is filled by the waitlisted candidates. Below is the Nirma University fee refund policy: % Refund of the Fee Point of time when notice of withdrawal is served by a student to the institute 100% More than 15 days before the formally notified last date of admission 90% Between 15 days and up to the formally notified last date of admission 80% Up to 15 days after the formally notified last date of admission 50% Between 16 days and up to 30 days after the formally notified last date of admission 00% More than 30 days after the formally notified last date of admission

description: Nirma University cutoff 2024 for admission to the Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) course has been released. The University accepts JEE Main entrance exam scores for admitting students to its BArch program. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the exam section below to view the Nirma University cutoff 2024 for different exams, courses and categories. A few more updates are below:

Nirma University JEE Main cutoff 2025 will soon be updated on this page. In the meantime, students can refer to the the table below to know the Nirma University JEE Main cutoff 2024. The cutoff was concluded for admission to BTech specialisations, and was released for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. For the General AI category candidates, the cutoff was for BArch in the last round closing rank was 22002. For the General Home State category candidates, the cutoff was 120

Nirma University Cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to BArch and BTech specialisations. The cutoff was released for reserved and unreserved categories under the All India and Home State category candidates. For the General All India category candidates, the closing rank for BArch was 22002. For the General Home State category candidates, the cutoff for different BTech specialisations closed between the rank of 18850 and 50354.

In this section, the table below showcases the important dates releated to Nirma University JEE Main Cutoff 2025. Students can see the table below to know the same. Students can keep track of these dates so that they don't miss a deadline.

Nirma University CAT Cutoff 2025 will be available on this page as soon as the results are announced. For the time being, students can refer to the table below to know the Nirma University CAT Cutoff 2024, as well cutoff data for 2023 and 2022. CAT Cutoff 2024 was 60 overall for the General All India category. To know more, see below:

Nirma University Cutoff 2024 for the MBA course is based on CAT 2023 scores followed by the GD and PI. Candidates seeking admission to Nirma University MBA course have to appear for CAT exam and attain the minimum cutoff. As per the previous year cutoff ranks, only candidates with a overall percentile of 60 and sectional percentile of 40 each are eligible for admissions. Refer to the table below to know year-wise percentiles for Nirma University MBA cutoff:

Students who are aiming for admission at Nirma University for its MBA programme must keep a track on the important CAT dates. Refer to the table below for Nirma University MBA/ PGDM Important dates 2025:

Nirma University is top ranked by multiple national ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the Nirma University rankings.

nirf.description:
Nirma University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Nirma University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Pharmacy' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Nirma University climbed 5 ranks to #32 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Architecture and Planning' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Nirma University fell 10 ranks to #29 rank in the 'Architecture and Planning' category by the NIRF ranking.

library.description:
Nirma University library acts as a key resource and learning center of the University to meet the information needs of more than 6,000 users. It has adopted open source software KOHA for integrated library management. Each constituent institute of the University has a separate library which is located in their respective buildings. To facilitate users with reading and brain storming, separate reading rooms have been provided along with the libraries. Nirma University libraries are fully computerized and collect/ procure a variety of learning resources in different formats like print, online, electronic and digital. It has a collection of 1,07,288 books and 13,661 online periodicals.

Library has subscribed to several Institutional Memberships like INFLIBNET Centre, The American Resource Library center-Mumbai, The British Library – Ahmedabad, Institute of Engineers – Kolkata, Indian Society for Earthquake Technology (ISET), Developing Library Network (DELNET), Indian Geotechnical Society, The Computer Society of India, Vikram Sarabhai Library - IIM.
