reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great private college for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure-wise, Nirma is top-notch. They have a class with AC in some blocks and a spacious place. We have a good football and cricket ground. Basketball courts and volleyball courts are also there. There is a 5-storey library on campus, which is the best place to study during exams, and even though it is big, it is silent. There are many books from all departments and topics. We have 4 canteens with great food and great service. 2 of them close at about 4-6 pm, and the other 2 stay till 10...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 1 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Students life at Nirma University.
reviews.review_text: The campus is surrounded by greenery. The architecture of the buildings is modern, with Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, and projectors. The classroom design is awesome. The library is modern and has six floors. The hostel facility is good. Multiple sports grounds, meetup places, and two or three canteens are available for students to relax and socialize.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 25 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellence of faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus. Classrooms are basic and computer labs are still under resource as some of them are still holder model and electricity issues sometimes occur. There is food issue in the canteen. Sometimes, when food is served, insects are there.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Institute of Law, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 13 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Law Nirma University Ahmedabad Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: The campus houses the building of all other departments. For ILNU, there are 4 floors in the building, from basement to 3rd floor. There is a moot court hall and a seminar hall. All classrooms have projectors, and smart classrooms are mostly on the 3rd floor. There are 4 hostels on campus: 3 for male students and 1 for female students, each having 4 floors. The mess provides meals 4 times a day. There is also a stadium and a medical facility on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 15 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nirma University is a good private college.
reviews.review_text: All rooms are air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi facility is available for free. There is proper parking space, and the campus is surrounded by greenery. The canteen is affordable, hygienic, and offers the best food. There are four canteens K canteen, Pharma canteen, Law canteen, and MBA canteen and all of them are excellent. Labs are also well-equipped and among the best. The college has the best infrastructure and a peaceful environment without any stress.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Institute of Law, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great campus and facility, but the value for money is still questionable with average placements.
reviews.review_text: The best part is its campus and hostel, it is around 125 acres, all green, although because of the greenery and the secluded place, there are many animals and snakes, it becomes pathetic during the rains. Apart from this, there is Wi-Fi, a central library, reading room, gym, sports area, mess facility, 3 canteens with a wide range of food items with average pricing and good food. The classrooms have AC, there is also a sick room, and it really helps when girls are on their period and not feeling...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 29 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: An honest opinion on Nirma University.
reviews.review_text: There are multiple canteen on campus which provides a wide range of options. There is a gym, a playground for multiple sports and games. The campus is open from 10:30 AM to 11:00 PM for all. Those who live in hostels can stay inside. Overall, the facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 17 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great placement, strong academics, and impressive campus life.
reviews.review_text: Nirma University CSE department offers smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, advanced labs (AI/ML, data science), and a rich central library. Hostels are clean with good Wi-Fi, 24/7 security, and laundry. Mess food is decent, canteen offers variety. Medical center is available on campus. Sports complex has facilities for cricket, football, badminton, gym, etc. Overall infrastructure is modern and well-maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Institute of Management, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 13 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Wonderful life at IMNU.
reviews.review_text: High-speed Wi-Fi is available around the campus. The classrooms are very huge with great facilities like projectors, speakers, etc. Vending machines are also available near our BBA classrooms for us. We have a library named NIMA, which is very huge and spacious, with a lot of books and studying area. Hostel facilities are only there for female students in BBA. The hostel is very nice and clean. There are various hostels, H1, H2, H3, etc. NU follows a strictly vegetarian food policy. The quality ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 1 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has good classrooms and infrastructure. Faculty members and courses are fantastic.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are awesome, and the infrastructure is so good. Here we have a 4-floor central library with almost every book that we need. However, here technology students don't get hostels, but they can find PG near the college. Medical facilities are good, and we have a sports and games ground too. We will also get a new sports complex in 2-3 years.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Institute of Management, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 10 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for the MBA course are good enough. Wi-Fi is provided within the institute and also neat and clean. Classrooms and library are great, one big 5-floor library for all the departments and grounds for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 27 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Technology, Nirma University.
reviews.review_text: Hindi college campus is well-equipped with the latest classrooms equipped with smart boards. The laboratories are recruited with the latest instruments. The college campus is about 105 acres big with very good sports facilities. There are three canteens in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 17 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied and happy with campus life and various events that build my career at par it's limit.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is for PG students for boys and girls, and a hostel is also available for B.Tech students. The campus functions with Wi-Fi, labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and three libraries, and it is open to every student. Even students from other institutes can become part of events organized by various clubs at Nirma University.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 6 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college but have a hectic curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is so good. Classes are well-maintained. There are ACs in some classes and some don't. Labs are managed with advanced technology equipment and software used for simulation purposes. Hostels are only available for girls till the end of the third year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology, Nirma UniversityReviewed on 19 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The attendance policy is a headache, but there are good placements and a very good campus.
reviews.review_text: It is a well-organized campus with Wi-Fi-enabled labs and classrooms, a 5-floor library which was recently built, and the facility is very well. AC classrooms are there, and 80-seat classrooms are there. The quality of food and mats in the canteen, medical facilities, and sports and games are very good. A sports complex is built and the food quality is good. Hostel is hard to get, but only for outside Ahmedabad, not for locals.

data.description: Nirma University Ahmedabad Gujarat faculty are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. Nirma University has experienced faculty members. Nirma University Ahmedabad Gujarat faculty motivates students to work on their knowledge and skills.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Nirma University

likes.text: Many reputed companies like Microsoft, Facebook, Yahoo, TCS, Cognizant, Oracle, Samsung, Infosys, etc., visited the campus to hire the students.
Good companies come to hire the students of different departments and all this procedure is balanced and easy for students to build their careers in desired way.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Many sports facilities are also available like cricket, volleyball, badminton, lawn tennis, basketball, football, etc.
We had three canteens, and that serves good food, and there is one mess for hostel students, and that is only for MBA programme students.
The facilities like the Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well-functioned.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Faculty members are very knowledgeable in their subjects as well as very helpful in students' self-development.
The curriculum of the course is very good and includes other field subjects during the first year, which improves students' overall knowledge and makes them ready for industrial work.

Faculty.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: The best things about the place has been - the Campus, the Infrastructure, the Sports ground, and the Multiple Clubs and Committees which boost students for nurturing their talent.
The extracurricular and co-curricular activities of the college are amazing and there is always an event going in the campus.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a smart and advanced college in the name of an engineering college.

review_content.Placements: The placement ratio is 90%, which means most students get placed. But the problem is that most students get placed in either TCS or Infosys. They are service-based companies and offer almost 3–4 LPA, while very few students, like 1 in 200, get placed in product-based companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very poor. They have Wi-Fi with no internet connection. Classrooms are exactly like school classrooms, and there is no AC or cooler in the classrooms. The canteen is too small, the library is okay, but there are no good sports facilities. I can say that sports are below average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: NIET has good placement. Faculty are very supportive, and the infrastructure is average.

review_content.Placements: NIET offers average placement opportunities, especially for core and emerging branches. Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. The average package is around 6 LPA, and the highest package is around 52 LPA. Around 60 to 70 percent of students are placed. And some students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Previously, the NIET infrastructure was very bad, but they have improved their infrastructure. The campus size is very small, but NIET has a total of 3 individual infrastructure plots 14, 15, and 19. Plot 15 are the newly made campus for first-year students. The campus life at NIET is very good. I extremely recommend first-year students to take the college hostel. The food quality is decent, Wi-Fi is good, and medical sports facilities are also very good. The infrastructure of classes is that every class has a smart board, but the tables are very bad. Canteens are very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Neutral placement and infrastructure is okay-okay.

review_content.Placements: Around 20-30% of students are placed in MCA. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and average is 3 LPA - 4 LPA. For recruiting, both technical and non-technical companies visit to hire students. Recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, Infosys, and Capgemini. Top roles offered are software developer and technical support.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has two small campuses for computer application students, and classes are conducted in both campuses. Sometimes classes are held in one campus and sometimes in another, which became frustrating for the students. Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are available. But there is no sitting area and lunch area for students. Computer labs are available and used for practical sessions.

review_summary.college_name: NIET Gr Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent college with decent placements.

content.Placements: If you have a 7+ CGPA with no ongoing backlogs, there is almost a 90% certainly of in-campus placement. As the college has tie-ups with mass recruiters, you are likely to get a placement, but don't expect the placement numbers to be very good or satisfactory. Some recruiters include Infosys, TCS, HCL, etc. , with an average package of around 6 LPA and the highest touching up to 54 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here at NIET is honestly a bit of a mixed bag. For our CSE labs, the equipment is actually quite decent and up-to-date, and the smart boards in the classrooms make lectures easier to follow. The central library is huge and has almost every book you’d need, though it gets super crowded during exams. However, the Wi-Fi can be a real pain. It's okay in the labs, but in the hostel, the speed is pretty consistent, and they have a lot of blocked sites, which is frustrating when you're trying to work on projects.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Bad infrastructure and college life.

content.Placements: In my course, which is B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, there are about 240 students last year out of which about 120 to 140 are placed last year. The highest and the lowest packages are 39 LPA and 3 LPA respectively. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Wipro, Razor, TCS etc. About the internship, there are only 4 to 5 students who got a properly paid internship from the college others are enrolled in internships. They are required to pay to get enrolled and some got to companies by outreaching to them. The top roles offered are software developers, frontend developers, backend developers etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a smart and advanced college in the name of an engineering college.

content.Placements: The placement ratio is 90%, which means most students get placed. But the problem is that most students get placed in either TCS or Infosys. They are service-based companies and offer almost 3–4 LPA, while very few students, like 1 in 200, get placed in product-based companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very poor. They have Wi-Fi with no internet connection. Classrooms are exactly like school classrooms, and there is no AC or cooler in the classrooms. The canteen is too small, the library is okay, but there are no good sports facilities. I can say that sports are below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: NIET has good placement. Faculty are very supportive, and the infrastructure is average.

content.Placements: NIET offers average placement opportunities, especially for core and emerging branches. Top recruiters are TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. The average package is around 6 LPA, and the highest package is around 52 LPA. Around 60 to 70 percent of students are placed. And some students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Previously, the NIET infrastructure was very bad, but they have improved their infrastructure. The campus size is very small, but NIET has a total of 3 individual infrastructure plots 14, 15, and 19. Plot 15 are the newly made campus for first-year students. The campus life at NIET is very good. I extremely recommend first-year students to take the college hostel. The food quality is decent, Wi-Fi is good, and medical sports facilities are also very good. The infrastructure of classes is that every class has a smart board, but the tables are very bad. Canteens are very good.

admission_overview.college_name: NIET Gr Noida Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: NIET Noida admission 2025 is open. The institute offers various courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA etc at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses the institutions also offer diploma courses.Noida Institute of Engineering and Technologyis affiliated withAKTU.NIET College, Greater Noida offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Management etc. NIET Greater Noida offers BTech and BPharma Lateral Entry courses. Apart from this, the institute also offers direct admission to the Management/NRI quota. Read the following article to know more aboutNoida Institute of Engineering and Technologycourse admission2025.

The mode of study atNIET College Greater Noidacourses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. Read on to know more aboutNoida Institute of Engineering and Technologycourse admissions2025.

NIET Collegeadmissions to all the courses is a mix of entrance and merit-based. NIET Greater Noida also accepts CUET scores for some of the courses. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria forNIET College course admission2025:
To know more about UG and PG courses,make your course selection here.

NIET College Greater eligibility for admission to the various courses, intake, reservations, and admission process/procedures to the courses offered by AKTU is as decided by the CAB/AKTU. The NIET Greater Noida offers direct admission to Management quota/NRI. A total of 15% of the approved intake of a course is filled under this category as per the Govt. of UP and AKTU guidelines. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in NIET College:
STEP 1: NIET Noida Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college. Candidates need to pay the course application fee to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

NIET College shortlists candidates based on entrance exam scores, PI or counselling. The candidate needs to appear for the JEE Exam and appear in online counselling of UPCET. The college will display a provisional merit list. Students who are looking for direct admission, the college may conduct admission tests /on a merit basis/other criteria defined by the college admission policy.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.
Check below for a common review about NIET Greater Noida:

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech in NIET Noida?
faqs.answer: The candidate needs to appear for the JEE Exam and appear in online counselling of UPCAT. Candidate needs to opt NIET as the preferred choice in any of the branches offered by the institute. The college may conduct admission tests/on a merit basis/other criteria defined by the college admission policy.

faqs.question: Can we do MBBS after DPharmacy from NIET Noida?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot pursue DPharma if they are from theCommercestream. In India, most DPharma programs require candidates to have a Science background with specific subjects at the Class 12 level, includingPhysics, Chemistry, and eitherBiologyor Mathematics. As a Commerce student, candidates may not meet the typical eligibility criteria for D Pharma admission since they would not have studied the necessarySciencesubjects.

faqs.question: Can I get into Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology without CAT?
faqs.answer: Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology provides various programmes and specialisations to students. For obtaining Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology admission, candidates are required to appear for the prescribed entrance tests. Students can visit the official website of the Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology to learn more regarding the eligibility details for their preferred course choice. Accepted exams include CUET and UPTAC.

courses_data.name: NIET Noida MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: NIET Greater Noida offers five MTech and one ME course (working professional) at the PG level. Candidates should have completed BTech to pursue MTech courses at NIET College Greater Noida. The selection criteria for the course is UPTAC counselling.

faqs.question: What is the M.Tech selection criteria at Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: For admission to BTech at NIET College Greater Noida, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The next step of the selection criteria is UPTAC counselling. Candidates must pass BTech with 45% aggregate. However, forMTech CSEcourse admission, aspirants need to complete BTech degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Computer Science/ Information Technology and related branches.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam score is accepted for DPharm course admission at NIET Noida?
faqs.answer: NIET Noida admit candidates to the DPharm course based on merit in the Uttar Pradesh Joint Entrance Examination (JEECUP).The entrance test is held in an online mode. The entrance examination check the aptitude and knowledge of the candidates in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics. Moreover, the exam fees isINR 350for General/OBC andINR 250for SC/ST. Read more abouthow to apply for JEECUP.

faqs.question: Is the NIET Noida DPharm application form out?
faqs.answer: NIET Noida DPharm registrationis open. Aspirants can visit the institutes' official website to register and complete the application procedure. The application last date is not available as of now. Aspirants should apply as soon as possible. Some of the details to be provided for registration are:Candidates first nameCandidates last nameValid email IDMobile numbersSelect course & specialisation

faqs.question: What is the NIET JEE Main cutoff trend for BTech CSE?
faqs.answer: NIET JEE Main cutoff 2024was published for admission to the BTech course specialisations. The cutoff was released in the form of ranks for various categories under both the All India and Home State quota.For the General AI category, the BTech CSE course had a cutoff of247159. In 2024 and 2023, the cutoff was228214and149531, respectively. This change in the cutoff  ranks says that competition has been decreeasing over the years, since the lower the rank, the easier the admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to the Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET)?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission is possible at Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology. Eligibility for admission to the various courses, intake, reservations, and admission process/procedures to the courses offered by AKTU is as per decided by the CAB/AKTU.  A total of 15% of the approved intake of a course is filled under this category as per the Govt. of UP and AKTU guidelines. Further, students must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at NIET Noida?
faqs.answer: Yes, National Institute of Engineering and Technology Greater Noida admission is open.  The institute offers various courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA etc. at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses the institutions also offer Diploma courses.Noida Institute of Engineering and Technologyis affiliated with AKTU.NIET College, Greater Noida offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Management etc.

faqs.question: Does NIET Noida accept CUET scores?
faqs.answer: Yes, the NIET Noida accept CUET scores for admission to its undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The university offers four undergraduate courses through CUET, which are:BBABCAMBA/PGDMMCA

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria required to pursue a B.E. or B.Tech. from the Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET)?
faqs.answer:
The B.Tech eligibility criteria of NIET is below. 
Eligibility: Candidate must have passed 10+2 level examination or its equivalent from any recognised Board / University and securing minimum 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ST Category candidates) without grace in required each compulsory subjects and one optional subject was taken together. 
Admission criteria: JEE Main.

description: NIET Noida cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about NIET Noida UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The NIET Noida cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the NIET Noida BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 247159 and 1336809 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 247159 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 228214 in 2023 and 149531 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated an improving trend.

Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET) accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to NIET Noida can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

NIET Noida JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET).

CUET PG cutoff 2024 for NIET Noida has been concluded with the release of third-round of seat allotment. Considering the 2024 CUET PG last round, the cutoff score for MCA was, 13732 for the students belonging to the General AI category. To learn more about the course, round, and category-wise cutoff scores, use the filters provided below: The NIET Noida CUET PG cutoff 2024 is tabulated below for the first and last-round for the General quota:

NIET Noida Counselling 2024 has been concluded for admission to the PG courses for various categories such as General, OBC, SC, and ST. Students can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds to get an idea of the past years trends.

hostel_campus.college_name: NIET Gr Noida Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A decent college with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here at NIET is honestly a bit of a mixed bag. For our CSE labs, the equipment is actually quite decent and up-to-date, and the smart boards in the classrooms make lectures easier to follow. The central library is huge and has almost every book you’d need, though it gets super crowded during exams. However, the Wi-Fi can be a real pain. It's okay in the labs, but in the hostel, the speed is pretty consistent, and they have a lot of blocked sites, which is frustrating when you'...

reviews.review_heading: Bad infrastructure and college life.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are okay but there is a lack of air conditioning. We also raised a complaint to the dean about that but the management is too slow. Wi-Fi is also mess you only get 2GB data per day and you need to login with your I would everytime you are disconnected also there are many place inside the campus where internet speed is not good and even Wi-Fi gets disconnected hostel is okay we get proper food and there are not much complain about it infrastructure is kind old but renovation is don...

reviews.review_heading: It is a smart and advanced college in the name of an engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very poor. They have Wi-Fi with no internet connection. Classrooms are exactly like school classrooms, and there is no AC or cooler in the classrooms. The canteen is too small, the library is okay, but there are no good sports facilities. I can say that sports are below average.

reviews.review_heading: NIET has good placement. Faculty are very supportive, and the infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: Previously, the NIET infrastructure was very bad, but they have improved their infrastructure. The campus size is very small, but NIET has a total of 3 individual infrastructure plots 14, 15, and 19. Plot 15 are the newly made campus for first-year students. The campus life at NIET is very good. I extremely recommend first-year students to take the college hostel. The food quality is decent, Wi-Fi is good, and medical sports facilities are also very good. The infrastructure of classes is that ev...

reviews.review_heading: Neutral placement and infrastructure is okay-okay.
reviews.review_text: College has two small campuses for computer application students, and classes are conducted in both campuses. Sometimes classes are held in one campus and sometimes in another, which became frustrating for the students. Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are available. But there is no sitting area and lunch area for students. Computer labs are available and used for practical sessions.

reviews.review_heading: Not very satisfied with college but if we just want to come for placement opportunities than ok.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of college are just average, not good. But hostels are quite good or we can say above average. Food is decent, not very good. Medical facilities are okay as we can just get ever. In hostel, they have carrom, badminton, and some other games to play.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is good, the warden mam is a nice person and helpful. Lab facilities are present. Mess is good, and the canteen facility is also there. Infrastructure is there, and all facilities are provided, like a classroom, labs, library and auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: My personal experience of NIET.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the college and hostel. You have to generate your id. The hostel provides you with all your essentials. The food is okay, not bad. You have a ground for sports, and the canteen is also pretty good. You have a mother diary here also. Medical block is also available here.

reviews.review_heading: College is average, infrastructure is average, but sometimes it feels faculty are skipping topics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms and library is good. The labs are good, but the classrooms are a bit small. The hostel facility is average, but sometimes the mess food is not so good and is too spicy sometimes. Medical facilities are good, and currently the playground is being repaired.

reviews.review_heading: I really do not recommend this college. You can see other better alternatives.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure, it is good, and the Wi-Fi facility in the library is also impressive. Classrooms are well furnished. The sports and games department and medical facilities are 8 out of 10. Food available in the mess is healthy to eat, and they make the food accordingly.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, the placement is good.
reviews.review_text: In this course, classrooms given to students are very well-maintained, and AC facilities are also provided in every classroom and lab. In each lab, proper internet is available, and PCs are provided to each student for their work. In the hostel, all facilities are provided. Mess food is good, and a canteen is provided on campus. There is a proper area of sports.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university in Noida for students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this course is good. It supports students for future purposes. There are many facilities, including 24/7 Wi-Fi. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned. The university has multiple libraries where students can study together. Many hostels are available. The food in both the canteen and hostel is good. The university also provides medical facilities. Sports events are organized every week.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good placement ratio but average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a good environment for students to stay focused towards their goal, and the faculty members are good and very helpful. The infrastructure is quite good; the labs are really good, fully AC, and all PCs are working properly. Classrooms are also fine, but I think they should install AC in every classroom because in summer time it is really hot. Overall, it is good; hostels and canteen are good, everything is available, and the medical room is quite fine.

reviews.review_heading: Workshops are key for learning coding.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. The cafeteria is very small and not very clean. The campus has a small sports ground, one basketball court, and five blocks named A to E. There are two campuses. The old one and the new one, with the new campus for first-year students and the old campus for other years. There is a hostel on campus with Wi-Fi and hot water facilities in winter. A mess is also available inside.

reviews.review_heading: NIET is a quite good college.
reviews.review_text: They do provide Wi-Fi facilities, but that is not very good. They have an average classroom, but it gets hard during the summer since no air-conditioners are available. Otherwise, the overall average infrastructure. The quality of the food is also very average.

data.description: Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology has trained and experienced faculty members. Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology employs professionals in the post of Assistant Professors, Dy. Head and Assistant Professor, Professor and HOD, Professor and Dean, and others. The Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology also invites guest faculty for lectures and workshops. The NIET Noida faculty and non-faculty members keep themselves updated with the latest information from time to time and the faculty also act as mentor to students.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, Amazon, Capgemini, CGI, Mindtree, Cognizant, HCL, Deloitte, etc., visit our campus.
Top roles like software developer, assistant software developer, QA testing engineer, salesforce developer, etc., are offered to the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: ESIC Medical College and PGIMSR and Model Hospital, Bangalore offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBBS. Whereas, at PG level, ESIC Medical College and PGIMSR and Model Hospital, Bangalore offers courses such as MD and MS. ESIC Medical College Bangalore fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,17,450 to 4,94,325.

faqs.answer: A:    ESIC Medical College and PGIMSR and Model Hospital, Bangalore is a well-known institution for MS, MBBS, MD courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. ESIC Medical College and PGIMSR and Model Hospital, Bangalore has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, General Surgery, Community Medicine, Radiology.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: ESIC: a doorway to quality medical education.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for MBBS; there is only post-graduation, and the opportunities in ESIC are very good, with 50% state and All India Quota, a salary of INR 75k+/month, a fee of INR 2.6L/year, and the availability of scholarships for those meeting the criteria.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is above average, or say on par with a private institution, with all facilities available, but it lacks playing facilities. With a 10-story hostel and a 6-story academic block and hospital, the patients are the best part of ESI, with free treatment available to all card holders.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to be a good doctor, you won't get a better college than this.

review_content.Placements: All 125 students are placed in government hospitals. The average salary offered is Rs.90,000 - Rs.100000 per month. The top role offered is a junior resident. Top recruiting companies like ESI Hospital, etc., visit our campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The academic block and hospital are excellent. The patient flow is too high. You get all the super-specialty departments in the hospital. The surrounding area of the campus is good. You get all your requirements near the campus.

review_summary.college_name: ESIC Medical College and PGIMSR and Model Hospital, Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An honest review of ESIC Medical College Bangalore from a student's perspective.

content.Placements: Almost all of students get placed from our college after completing the course. All students who pass the final year get into internships and are paid around Rs. 3,60,000 for the entire year. In our course, we learn about the human body, its mechanisms, medicine, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in our college are top-notch. We are provided with Wi-Fi on each floor, and classrooms are there on every floor. We have every kind of lab in all departments. Rooms in the hostel are good and well-maintained, but we don't have a single room for the entire course. We don’t have a mess here, but the college is in the middle of Bangalore, so there are many tiffin services and restaurants nearby. All medical facilities are free for students, and we do have sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of ESIC Medical College and PGIMSR and Model Hospital.

content.Placements: All of the students who graduate will get into any hospital and work to earn more than 50 thousand per month. There is no package in this course; you have to do postgraduate and specialize and start working in the specific department. There are courses like Medicine, Surgery, Obstetrics and Gynecology, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are, a medical hospital which is a tertiary level medical institute and with a medical college. The infrastructure is good enough, the patient loads in the hospital are also good, we can learn many things in each department. The college also has a library where many books are kept to study and is spacious.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: ESIC: a doorway to quality medical education.

content.Placements: There are no placements for MBBS; there is only post-graduation, and the opportunities in ESIC are very good, with 50% state and All India Quota, a salary of INR 75k+/month, a fee of INR 2.6L/year, and the availability of scholarships for those meeting the criteria.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is above average, or say on par with a private institution, with all facilities available, but it lacks playing facilities. With a 10-story hostel and a 6-story academic block and hospital, the patients are the best part of ESI, with free treatment available to all card holders.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you want to be a good doctor, you won't get a better college than this.

content.Placements: All 125 students are placed in government hospitals. The average salary offered is Rs.90,000 - Rs.100000 per month. The top role offered is a junior resident. Top recruiting companies like ESI Hospital, etc., visit our campus.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The academic block and hospital are excellent. The patient flow is too high. You get all the super-specialty departments in the hospital. The surrounding area of the campus is good. You get all your requirements near the campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its infrastructure.

content.Placements: Most students enroll in PG courses at college. Some students pursue master's degrees in the US and UK. Others take various exams and settle very well in their lives. Some of us started our practices either in clinics or hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms and labs are well-equipped. We have a well-maintained hostel that is situated in the city and provides all the amenities required. Labs are good and well-funded by the central government. They provide the best service to students.

In respect of PwBD candidates as per NMC and DCI Regulations, the minimum marks in the qualifying examination in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (or Botany & Zoology)/Biotechnology taken together shall be 40% instead of 50%.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Great Place with Above Average infrastructure, but a strict administration.

review_content.Placements: Mgm Medical College. This being a medical college, there are no Campus placements taking place as such. But the coursework and internship is good here, so that thestudents can write the PG entrance with certain confidence and secure residency with a starting pay of 45-65 thousand rupees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with dedicated air conditioned classrooms for each year. Anatomy dissection hall is provided for with enough specimens around 1 per 10 students which is an excellent ratio. The labs are basic, but have all the amenities needed for ground-level experiments. If interested the students can undertake independent projects under proper guidance and use the higher level labs for research. There is no Wi-Fi on campus for common usage. However in the library along with the collection of the latest books and journals, you can have free access to international journals whose subscription is paid for by the institute. The computer room is well maintained, with the latest hardware and software. The hostel rooms are on a 3 person sharing basis. The rooms are comfortable with 24 hr electricity and water supply. Separate hostels for boys and girls of undergraduate and a separate hostel for postgraduate trainees. The mess provides 3-4 meals a day. The cafeteria is located at a stones throw. It has a good vegetarian and non vegetarian menu. Along with ice cream and cold drinks. Adjoining the hostel is a huge central ground, with goal posts and a cricket pitch. Indoor games facility can be found in the boys common room. As for the Medical facilities, a super speciality tertiary care teaching hospital is present on the campus itself with round the clock availability of specialist doctors and advanced investigations and treatment facilities, offered at discounted rates to college students.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good accommodation facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not offered in any medical college. The stipend is offered during internships. We have to search for a job ourselves after MBBS but the general trend is to prepare for NEET PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratory is updated with all the required facilities. The hostels are very good. There are common washrooms on every floor. Around 3 students can accommodate in each hostel room. Watercoolers are available on every floor. The mess facility is average, and they provide meals 4 times a day.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty members are very good. They cover all the topics by explaining everything. Both PPTs and boards are used in our classrooms. They are very helpful. The practical sessions are conducted regularly with posting in different departments.

In respect of PwBD candidates as per NMC and DCI Regulations, the minimum marks in the qualifying examination in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (or Botany & Zoology)/Biotechnology taken together shall be 40% instead of 50%. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. overview_faqs.question: Is MGM Medical College, Navi Mumbai a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: MGM Medical College, Navi Mumbai is a reputed institute for M.Sc., Ph.D., PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. MGM Medical College, Navi Mumbai has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.5 on campuslife, 3.5 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: MGM Medical College, Navi Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Great Place with Above Average infrastructure, but a strict administration.

content.Placements: Mgm Medical College. This being a medical college, there are no Campus placements taking place as such. But the coursework and internship is good here, so that thestudents can write the PG entrance with certain confidence and secure residency with a starting pay of 45-65 thousand rupees.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well-equipped with dedicated air conditioned classrooms for each year. Anatomy dissection hall is provided for with enough specimens around 1 per 10 students which is an excellent ratio. The labs are basic, but have all the amenities needed for ground-level experiments. If interested the students can undertake independent projects under proper guidance and use the higher level labs for research. There is no Wi-Fi on campus for common usage. However in the library along with the collection of the latest books and journals, you can have free access to international journals whose subscription is paid for by the institute. The computer room is well maintained, with the latest hardware and software. The hostel rooms are on a 3 person sharing basis. The rooms are comfortable with 24 hr electricity and water supply. Separate hostels for boys and girls of undergraduate and a separate hostel for postgraduate trainees. The mess provides 3-4 meals a day. The cafeteria is located at a stones throw. It has a good vegetarian and non vegetarian menu. Along with ice cream and cold drinks. Adjoining the hostel is a huge central ground, with goal posts and a cricket pitch. Indoor games facility can be found in the boys common room. As for the Medical facilities, a super speciality tertiary care teaching hospital is present on the campus itself with round the clock availability of specialist doctors and advanced investigations and treatment facilities, offered at discounted rates to college students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good accommodation facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are not offered in any medical college. The stipend is offered during internships. We have to search for a job ourselves after MBBS but the general trend is to prepare for NEET PG.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory is updated with all the required facilities. The hostels are very good. There are common washrooms on every floor. Around 3 students can accommodate in each hostel room. Watercoolers are available on every floor. The mess facility is average, and they provide meals 4 times a day.
content.Faculty: Our faculty members are very good. They cover all the topics by explaining everything. Both PPTs and boards are used in our classrooms. They are very helpful. The practical sessions are conducted regularly with posting in different departments.

review_summary.college_name: CGC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Cyber Security - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Admission to the university is highly recommended.

content.Placements: The placement drive CGC University offers a high rate of recruitment (86 percent). Big industries like Amazon, IBM, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Adobe visit the campus and hire the best talent of the university. The average package offered to students is 12 LPA, and the highest package offered is 50 LPA. The average internship rate is 84 percent in various tech companies like Adobe, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. The canteen serves hygienic and nutritious food. It offers 24x7 medical help.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placement, AI-driven.

content.Placements: We have a very high placement rate in our college. Our seniors have got jobs within and even out of the campus with more than 30 LPA. Even more than 50 companies visit the campus with the best offers to the students. The future is in safe hands.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.

content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed, and the highest package of 2026 is 87 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA. All the big companies come to our college. On December 23rd, there was a placement day where all 4th-year students celebrated their placements. All facilities were also enjoyed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.

content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.
content.Faculty: My course has more practical work, and it is the exposure given to me for getting a job in the private sector. The college is also providing the dcpd department, which helps us to crack the job. Apart from that, we attend workshops and industries, which help us to see the practical work.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.

content.Placements: Excellent and good packages offered by the college, including placements with top recruiting companies for every particular courses and along with this, they offer good roles. Approximately 80% of students succeed in taking internship from the companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidate who are looking for admission at CGC University can directly enrol for the respective course. The admissions is merit-based but for BTech and MBA programme, the university accept entrance exam such as JEE Main, CGCUET, etc. The students need to meet the last educational qualifications as per course requirement.

faqs.question: How can students join CGC University?
faqs.answer: CGC University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their past academic merit of Class 12 and graduation for UG and PG courses, respectively. Check below the step-wise CGC University admission process:Application Process:Apply for CGC University admissions in either offline or online mode.Selection Round:Admission to CGC University courses is both merit and entrance-based.Final Admission:After the completion of all the selection rounds, the selection candidates must pay a certain course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Are there any courses for which CGCUET is compulsory for scholarship and admission at CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, CGC University accepts CGCUET exam to offer admission and scholarship. Given below arecourses for which CGCUET is compulsory for scholarship and admission:BTech CSE (Computer Science & Engineering)BTech CSE (Cyber Security)BTech CSE (Data Science)BTech CSE (Internet of Things & Cyber Security Including Blockchain Technology)BTech AI & ML (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)BTech AI & DS (Artificial intelligence & Data Science)BTech Robotics & AI (Artificial Intelligence)BTech Blockchain

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for admission to CGC University BSc?
faqs.answer: CGC University admission portal is open for several courses including BSc. Students should register on-time to avoid missing out on the application process.

placement_report.college_name: CGC University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: CGC University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: CGC University Mohali has introduced Capgemini CodeXperience Centre for all BTech CSE and ECE students . It is a Global Capability Centre established exclusively for Capgemini placements . Through this Centre, structured and industry-integrated learning facility is provided to students on campus.

It is Capgemini’s one and only lab in North India. It will provide training to students for placements and hire more than 500 students every year. The training is based on Capgemini’s own syllabus that is designed as per global-skill requirements. There is an opportunity for students to get hired by Capgemini and more than 10 other partner companies through this training program.

CGC University has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The highest package offered stood at INR 1 Cr per annum . The student of the BTech CSE batch secured this package. 9 companies offered the package of INR 50 LPA to the batch 2025. More than 1005 recruiters visited the campus and placed 1361 students with good packages. The overall average salary secured by the batch 2025 was INR 6.34 LPA . The highest and average salaries offered to the MBA batch was INR 27 LPA and INR 9.5 LPA . The students of the BCA batch secured the highest salary of INR 33 LPA and the average salary of INR 9 LPA . The MCA batch secured the average salary of INR 10 LPA and the highest salary of INR 25 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of CG University in 2025 include Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing BPharma from CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, after completing the CGC University BPharma course, students become eligible for various jobs in government departments and organisations. Moreover, some of these jobs may require graduates to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations, such as UPSC, SSC, etc. Find below the list of popular government job profiles for DPharma graduates: MPSC Pharmacist OPSC Drug Inspector Railway (RRB) Pharmacist SBI Pharmacis ESIC Pharmacist

faqs.question: Does CGC University really offer 100% placements with good average salaries?
faqs.answer: CGC University offers 100% placement assistance to all of its students. Recently, CGC University offered an average package of INR 12 LPA to the students of the BTech CSE batch 2025. The course wise CGC University average package offered during the 2025 placement drive is presented below: Course Average Package (2025) BTech (CSE /AIDS/AIML) INR 12 LPA BTech (Civil /ME/ECE) INR 6.4 LPA MBA INR 9.5 LPA BBA INR 8 LPA BCA INR 9 LPA Bcom/Mcom INR 7 LPA Paramedical (BSC) INR 7 LPA BSC in Fashion Design INR 7 LPA LAW INR 7 LPA BSC in Graphic Design & Multimedia INR 6.5 LPA BSC in IT & Cybersecurity INR 6 LPA BAJMC INR 6.5 LPA MCA INR 10 LPA BSC in Nutrition & Dietics INR 6 LPA

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of CGC University placements?
faqs.answer: The University attracted various recruiters for its 2025 placement session who offered a variety of job roles to the students across sectors, such as BFSI, IT, Education, FMCG, Consulting, and E-Commerce, etc. The top recruiters of CGC University in 2025 included Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc. These recruiters placed students in various sectors and offered new-age job profiles.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to pursue the BCom (H) programme offered by CGC University?
faqs.answer: Total cost of BCom (H) programme offered by CGC University includes several charges like fee components, tuition fees, hostel charges, and one-time payment. As per the official website, total tuition fee for BCom (H) is around INR 93,000. Students who choose on-campus accommodation must pay hostel fees that depends on their room type. Hostel charges ranges between INR 1.18 lakh and INR 1.85 lakh per annum. It also depends on whether the room is Non-AC or AC and the seater type. Students must pay a one-time fee of INR 1,000. For more information about fee structure, check below: Fee components Amount Tuition fee INR 93,000 Hostel fee INR 1.18 lakh - INR 1.85 lakh (per annum) One-time Payment INR 1,000 Total fee Varies as per hostel type Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is subject to change.

outlook.description:
CGC University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, CGC University climbed 7 ranks to #112 rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'BBA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, CGC University climbed 2 ranks to #52 rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel.description: Hostels are provided with the facilities such as air cooler in each room, arrangement for 24 hours uninterrupted power supply through govt, power supply, and college generators, internet connectivity through wi-fi system, hot water in winters and RO purified drinking water, facilities for indoor and outdoor games, 24 x 7 medical dispensary with ambulance etc, 24 hours security,laundry facility (optional on payment basis),tuck shops to cater to daily needs of the students,newspapers and magazines and a well-equipped gym in each hostel.

library.description: The institute has a computerized library with well-set equipment and modern day technology to encourage research activities and advanced reading. The library is stocked with numerous books authored by experts on the subject and subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional.The library subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional dailies to keep the students in touch with their fields of interest. The library is well furnished and can seat more than 100 students at a time in the spacious reading hall. The peaceful atmosphere in the library plays a major role in helping students concentrate and study better.  Apart from books, the library has a good collection of Audio video material, NPTEL, CDs & DVDs. The library has a separate “Book Bank” exclusively for the high flyers. Institute has E-Library and Journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis, Handball Ground, Track and Field Ground

reviews.review_heading: Admission to the university is highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. T...

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, AI-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.

reviews.review_heading: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good and supportive. Placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best in the surrounding area. The college has separate buildings for separate departments, and each building has more than 10 blocks. Apart from that, classrooms are ventilated and spacious. However, we are facing some problems.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good and still improving.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It has Wi-Fi facilities, and it is one of the best facilities for students. It helps us in our studies. There are games and entertainment. There is a digital app that gives us practical knowledge. Classrooms are ventilated, big, and spacious. Seats are comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience is good teachers and understanding and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available and infrastructure is good, lab contains perfectly functioning computer systems. I live nearby, so I do not know about the hostel facilities.  It is decent. Despensory is present in the college for any medical issue.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good teaching staff members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and well-maintained. It is usually clean. Hostels are clean and very accommodating. Plenty of food places are available. There are sports grounds for games like football, basketball, etc. Sports that take place are always refreshing and amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Students get a balanced college experience at CGC University, Mohali.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University, Mohali is great and well maintained. Classrooms and labs are well equipped. Washrooms are properly cleaned, which makes the daily college life comfortable. Most of the facilities needed by the students are easily available. Hostel facilities are decent and safe. Basic amenities like water coolers, electricity, 24x7 Wi-Fi and security are available. The mess food is average but manageable. Overall, the hostel environment is good for studying and living. It fe...

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and I recommend it to my friends and juniors for enrollment.
reviews.review_text: Everything is very good. Food is tasty. Safety and security are provided. Four meals are provided daily. Food is on time without delay. Rooms are clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Decent private university.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with a clean, modern campus. Classrooms, labs, library, hostels, Wi-Fi, and sports facilities are well maintained. The campus environment is lively and supports both academics and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is very good, safe, secure, and educational institution.
reviews.review_text: The library in our college is very big and spacious and it is well-ventilated. There are more than 5000 physical books available, and digital libraries also level a part from that. There is a day and night facility for Wi-Fi but sometimes it goes very slow due to the use of students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placement, and enjoyable campus life.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure for our course. Classrooms are spacious. They are equipped with projectors. Labs are well maintained with updated systems and required software. Campus Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is average at times. Library is large, well organized, and has sufficient books and digital resources for students.

reviews.review_heading: It provides better career opportunities with overall development from sports to practical skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a smart classroom with Wi-Fi available to us by the university, and our department provides us with labs that have proper software to work with. We also have a library where we can get every type of book, as well as an online facility.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Adesh University?

faqs.answer: A:    Adesh University in Bathinda, Punjab, offers MBBS with a first-year fee of INR 15.5 Lakhs. Private medical colleges in India are generally expensive with fees varying significantly .Therefore, while Adesh University's MBBS programme is relatively costly, it is in line with the expenses of typical private medical colleges in India.
faqs.question: Is Adesh University very expensive for MBBS?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year.This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. The fee for NRI students is $1,25,000 for the whole course.The university has a total of 150 seats for MBBS, with 68 open merit seats,  37 scheduled caste seats,  15 backward classes seats,  7 physically handicapped/orthopedically handicapped seats, and 3 migrants from Jammu & Kashmir due to terrorist violence seatsThe fee for NRI students is $44,000 for the whole course.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MBBS at Adesh University?

faqs.answer: A:    There are a total of 425 seats in the BSc course at Adesh University. The candidates are primarily shortlisted based on their merit in the most recent qualifying examination and selected for admission to this course based on the number of seats sanctioned and filled. overview_faqs.answer: The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year.This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In short, I say this college infrastructure is good. The faculty is also helpful to students.

content.Placements: Almost all students were placed in different fields. The highest package went to about Rs. 50,000. Companies that offered jobs like Cipla, Mankind, etc. Roles offered in our course were Clinical Pharmacist, Clinical Researcher, Academic Professions, and Hospital Pharmacist as well.
content.Infrastructure: There were well-cleaned washrooms, classrooms, and the hospital, all maintained well. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus of the university and hospital. Facilities in the hostel included coolers and a well-functioning air conditioning system. The quality of food in the mess and canteen was excellent. Medical facilities were available across the campus. Sports and games were also provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I love my college in every way.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure, including well-furnished labs, a library, and classrooms with Wi-Fi. We do all our work on computers because our college has good partnerships with companies that provide computers. We are very thankful for that.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is very good in our college because teachers are knowledgeable and well-educated. Semester exams are not very tough but average, as teachers sometimes provide help with papers. The pass percentage is 35% in each exam.

paragraphs: Adesh University seat intakevaries as per the course and specialisation selected by the students. To secure a seat at the university students must participate in the counselling.Adesh University seatsvary for both on-campus and affiliated colleges. Students can check out the following table to learn about the total seat intake for some of the popular Adesh University Dharwad courses:

The admission procedure for Adesh University involves multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, application, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission must fulfil all of the required admission criteria before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailedAdesh University admissions process:
Step 1: Adesh University Application Process 2025

Adesh University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Adesh University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online, and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Adesh University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams, such as NEET, for the selection of respective courses.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds for the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take B.Pharma admission at Adesh University?
faqs.answer: To take admission in B.Pharma at Adesh University, Bathinda, interested candidates can follow the below procedure:Register and apply online with the required information.Candidates have to appear for the entrance test.Admission to the B.Pharma course is given based on the candidate's merit in the qualifying examination and the entrance test conducted by the University.Students who want to get a B.Pharma degree must get a 50% on the qualifying exams and the required percentage in 10+2. Students can take state-level admission.The institute offers Bachelor of Pharmacy, Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm. D.), and Diploma in Pharmacy courses.The applicant/candidate should have studied Physics, Chemistry, and any other subject in 10+2.

placement_data.title: Adesh University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Adesh University has not released the placement report or brochure. As per the Shiksha student's reviews, around 50% of the batch was placed in the recent placement drives. The lowest package and highest package offered were INR 1.05 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. Further, the average package for Adesh University placements in the past few years was between INR 2.2 LPA and INR 3 LPA . Dr. Morpen, Abbot, and Max Hospital were some of the leading companies that hired the students over the past years.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Adesh University?
faqs.answer: The University has not released the official placement report. However, some of the students have mentioned the placement details on Shiksha students' reviews, which are as follows: Particulars Placement Statistics Placement rate Around 50% Lowest package INR 1.05 LPA Average package INR 2.20 LPA - INR 3 LPA Highest package INR 5 LPA NOTE: The above placement details are gathered from the Shiksha students' reviews.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Adesh University?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Adesh University in 2022 was 4- 5 lpa. Adesh University, Bathinda has a placement cell that interacts with recruitment companies and sends them an annexure. The placements for the senior batch are quite impressive, with almost all students being placed. The university offers placement details, including the average and highest salary package, top companies, and percentage of batch placed. The university also has a Training and Placement Officer who works in consultation with the Coordinator Industry-Institute.

faqs.question: Who were the recruiters at the Adesh University placements 2023?
faqs.answer: The recruiters at the Adesh University placements 2023 are: Fortis hospital Cipla Apollo Novartis And many others recurring from Punjab and other sectors

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBBS at Adesh University?
faqs.answer: The fee for MBBS at Adesh University is Rs 11.9 Lacs per year. This fee is charged with a stipulation of a 10% annual increase. The fee for NRI students is $1,25,000 for the whole course. The university has a total of 150 seats for MBBS , with 68 open merit seats, 37 scheduled caste seats, 15 backward classes seats, 7 physically handicapped/orthopedically handicapped seats, and 3 migrants from Jammu & Kashmir due to terrorist violence seats The fee for NRI students is $44,000 for the whole course.

faqs.question: Is Adesh University very expensive for MBBS?
faqs.answer: Adesh University in Bathinda, Punjab, offers MBBS with a first-year fee of INR 15.5 Lakhs. Private medical colleges in India are generally expensive with fees varying significantly .Therefore, while Adesh University's MBBS programme is relatively costly, it is in line with the expenses of typical private medical colleges in India.
